title: Claude AI Integration Engineer
description:
We are seeking an experienced AI Integration Engineer to lead the implementation, integration, and operationalization of Claude (Anthropic) and ClawdBot across our business operations.



This role is not experimental. It is execution-driven.



You will design, deploy, and optimize enterprise-grade AI workflows that integrate Claude and ClawdBot into real business systems, including CRM, ticketing, cybersecurity operations, marketing automation, compliance documentation, reporting, and internal knowledge management.



The objective is measurable business impact, not surface-level automation.



Key Responsibilities:

• Architect and deploy Claude-based AI workflows across departments

• Integrate ClawdBot into internal systems and external client-facing workflows

• Build secure API integrations between Claude and our CRM, PSA, ERP, and BI systems

• Develop prompt engineering frameworks aligned with compliance and governance requirements

• Implement AI guardrails, logging, and role-based access controls

• Design automation workflows using tools such as n8n, Zapier, Power Automate, or custom scripts

• Create executive dashboards for AI utilization and ROI measurement

• Ensure all AI deployments align with cybersecurity and regulatory standards



Required Experience:

• Hands-on experience integrating Claude (Anthropic API) in production environments

• Experience deploying chatbot frameworks such as ClawdBot or similar LLM-based agents

• Strong API integration experience (REST, JSON, webhooks)

• Experience with workflow automation platforms

• Familiarity with prompt engineering methodologies

• Knowledge of AI governance, model limitations, and risk controls

• Experience working with enterprise data systems



Preferred Qualifications:

• Experience integrating AI into cybersecurity or compliance-driven environments

• Experience with Microsoft ecosystem tools (Power BI, Power Apps, Copilot)

• Knowledge of zero trust architecture principles

• Experience deploying AI in regulated industries (healthcare, finance, government)

• Python, Node.js, or similar scripting capability





Compensation:

• Competitive base salary

• Performance-based bonus tied to measurable AI impact

• Flexible engagement options (full-time, contract, hybrid)



Apply here and send resume to:

title: IT Manager / Field Supervisor
description:
Overview

We are seeking a seasoned IT Manager / Field Supervisor to lead our Managed Service Provider (MSP) operations with a strong focus on cloud infrastructure. This role will oversee helpdesk operations, field dispatch, and project management across a diverse client base. The ideal candidate will bring deep expertise in Azure, Microsoft 365, AWS, and hybrid environments, along with a proven ability to lead teams and deliver exceptional IT support in a fast-paced MSP setting.

Oversee cloud-centric IT projects including migrations, deployments, and infrastructure upgrades

Provide hands-on technical leadership in Azure, Microsoft 365, AWS, and hybrid environments

Mentor and manage a team of IT professionals, fostering collaboration and growth

Monitor SLAs and KPIs, and implement process improvements for operational efficiency

Collaborate with clients to assess needs, propose cloud-first solutions, and maintain strong relationships



Required Qualifications

Minimum of 10 years in IT management, with at least 5 years in an MSP helpdesk environment leading teams

Deep technical proficiency in:

Azure AD, Office 365, Intune, SharePoint, MS Exchange Server

AWS services including EC2, S3, IAM, and VPC configurations

Windows Server (on-prem and cloud-hosted)

Google Workspace and Google Cloud infrastructure

Setup and management of Ubiquiti, Cisco, SonicWall, Synology hardware

Strong project management experience in cloud migrations and IT deployments

Proven ability to manage ticket workflows and dispatch field resources effectively

Excellent leadership, communication, and problem-solving skills

Ability to work under pressure and adapt to evolving client needs



Preferred Qualifications

Certifications such as Microsoft Certified: Azure Administrator, AWS Certified Solutions Architect, Cisco CCNA

Experience with MSP tools like RMM and PSA platforms

Familiarity with cybersecurity best practices and compliance standards (e.g., HIPAA, GDPR)



Why Join Us

Lead a dynamic team in a growing MSP with a cloud-first approach

Competitive salary and benefits package

Access to cutting-edge technologies and ongoing professional development

Collaborative and innovative work culture



How to Apply

Please submit your resume, a cover letter detailing your relevant experience, and a short intro video. Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis until the position is filled.



Equal Opportunity Employer

We are committed to fostering a diverse and inclusive workplace. All qualified applicants will receive consideration without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, disability, or any other protected status.

title: Billing & Procurement Account Manager
description:
About Edge360 / Staff360

Edge360 / Staff360 is a trusted Managed Service Provider (MSP) and Business Process Outsourcing (BPO) agency. We help businesses streamline operations, optimize technology, and scale efficiently by providing reliable IT solutions and outsourcing support.

We’re growing fast and looking for motivated professionals who want to be part of a team that drives digital transformation.



Position Overview

We’re hiring a Billing & Procurement Account Manager who will play a key role in managing billing, procurement, and financial operations. This role requires someone detail-oriented, proactive, and comfortable working in a fast-paced environment.

You’ll be the go-to person for ensuring accuracy in billing, smooth procurement processes, and strong vendor relationships—all while supporting our MSP and BPO projects.



Key Responsibilities

Prepare accurate and competitive quotes for client projects in collaboration with sales and technical teams.

Manage procurement: sourcing, ordering, and tracking hardware, software, and other project resources.

Handle billing and invoicing, ensuring compliance with company policies and client agreements.

Maintain project plans, timelines, and budgets to support efficient delivery.

Act as the main contact for accounts payable/receivable, resolving inquiries quickly.

Work with the accounting team on reconciliations, reporting, and audits.

Manage vendor relationships, negotiate contracts, and identify cost-saving opportunities.

Assist with financial forecasting, budgeting, and process improvements.

Support ad-hoc tasks related to billing, procurement, and project management.



Qualifications

Bachelor’s degree in Business, Finance, Accounting, or related field (or equivalent experience).

At least 3 years of experience in billing, procurement, or financial management—preferably in MSP, BPO, or IT services.

Proficiency in financial software (QuickBooks, SAP, etc.) and project management tools (Microsoft Project, Asana, etc.).

Strong knowledge of procurement processes, vendor management, and invoicing best practices.

Excellent communication skills and the ability to work well with both internal teams and external partners.

High attention to detail, strong analytical skills, and problem-solving ability.

Ability to multitask and prioritize in a deadline-driven environment.

Familiarity with MSP/BPO industry standards is a plus.



What We Offer

Competitive salary with performance-based bonuses

Opportunities for career growth and professional development

Flexible remote work options

A collaborative and supportive team environment

Exposure to cutting-edge projects in a growing industry



How to Apply

If this sounds like the right fit for you, send us your resume and a short intro video highlighting your relevant experience.



We look forward to welcoming the right candidate to our team!

——————————————————

——————————————————

???? HOW TO APPLY

——————————————————

] with the subject line: "Airbnb VA – [Your Name]"

title: Social Media Content Creator (AI Video)
description:

The ideal candidate understands TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube algorithms and can optimize content for engagement, performance, and brand growth.

• Trend Spotting: Stay up-to-date with the latest social media trends, viral audio, and AI advancements to keep our brand relevant and innovative.

• Community Engagement: Monitor comments, engage with our audience, and track basic video performance metrics to see what works best.



Qualifications:

• Proven experience as a Content Creator, Social Media Manager, or similar role (please provide a portfolio or links to your social profiles).

• AI Video Knowledge: Hands-on experience or a strong understanding of how to prompt and utilize generative AI tools for video and audio creation.

• Video Editing Skills: Proficiency in standard editing apps and software (e.g., CapCut, Adobe Premiere, Final Cut Pro).

• Deep understanding of how algorithms work on TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube.

• Strong creative vision, storytelling ability, and attention to detail.

• Basic knowledge of analytics tools and performance tracking



Nice to have:

Experience in creating contents for real estate, construction, or consulting industries

Familiarity with compliance-related topics or B2B content creation



HOW TO APPLY:

2. What tools in content creation are you familiar with (Graphics and Video Editing, AI Tools for AI Generated Video Contents)?

3. How many years of experience do you have in managing Social Media Accounts of a client?

title: SEO Operations Specialist

6. Blog optimization support

mbers

* Local SEO ranking factors

---

* Pay: $4/hour (starting)

* Performance bonuses available based on leads and booked calls



---



**Your Responsibilities**



You will be responsible for:



* Finding local businesses with poor or no websites (Google Maps, Instagram,
, Yelp)

* Collecting contact info (name,
, phone, social links)

* Sending outreach messages 
 + social media DMs)

* Following up with leads (this is VERY important)

* Tracking all leads in a simple system (Google Sheets or CRM)

* Tagging and passing “interested” leads to our Account Rep



---



**Daily Targets (IMPORTANT)**



* 200–400 outreach messages per day

* 100–200 follow-ups per day

* 5–10 qualified leads passed daily



---



**What We’re Looking For**



* Strong written English

* Experience with lead generation or outreach (preferred)

* Organized and detail-oriented

* Able to follow instructions and systems exactly

* Reliable internet connection

* Able to work independently without constant supervision



---



**Bonus (Not Required)**



* Experience with cold
 or DM outreach

* Experience using Google Sheets or CRM tools

* Familiarity with local businesses (restaurants, contractors, etc.)



---



**How to Apply**



To be considered, please do the following:



1. Write “READY” at the top of your application

2. Send a short voice recording (30–60 seconds) introducing yourself

3. Answer this question:

   “How would you find businesses that need a new website?”



---



**Why Join Us**



* Stable, long-term work

* Clear system and training provided

* Opportunity to grow into higher roles (Account Rep, Manager)

* Performance bonuses



---



**Important**



This role is for someone who can:



* Work fast

* Follow a system

* Stay consistent daily



If you’re looking for a long-term opportunity and can handle high-volume outreach, we’d love to work with you.

title: PV (pharmacovigilance) Clinical Trial case processing experience (need 25 VA's)
description:
The Pharmacovigilance Associate is a fully WFH role and is responsible for the intake, processing, and management of safety cases arising from clinical trials. This role focuses on accurate documentation, evaluation, and reporting of adverse events in compliance with global pharmacovigilance regulations, study protocols, and company procedures.



Essential Functions:

• Perform case intake, triage, and data entry of adverse events, serious adverse events, and SUSARs from clinical trial sources

• Process safety cases in accordance with regulatory guidelines, study protocols, and internal standard operating procedures

• Review and interpret source documents including CIOMS forms, MedWatch reports, investigator communications, and clinical trial documentation

• Conduct medical review of cases and perform causality and expectedness assessments based on investigator reports and protocol requirements

• Perform case follow up with investigators or study teams to obtain missing information and ensure data completeness

• Manage safety queries and ensure timely resolution of case discrepancies

• Prepare and submit expedited safety reports to regulatory authorities, ethics committees, and investigators within required timelines

• Maintain accurate documentation and ensure compliance with global pharmacovigilance standards and reporting regulations





Knowledge, Skills, and Abilities:

• Experience in pharmacovigilance case processing within clinical trials

• Strong understanding of adverse event reporting, serious adverse events, and SUSAR reporting requirements

• Familiarity with global safety reporting regulations and clinical trial safety procedures

• Experience reviewing clinical safety documentation such as CIOMS and MedWatch forms

• Strong attention to detail and ability to meet strict regulatory timelines



Safety Database Experience:

• Argus Safety

• ARISg

• PV Edge

• Preferred experience with Veeva Vault Safety and EDC databases



Education:

• Bachelor’s degree in Life Sciences, Pharmacy, Nursing, or related field preferred.



If you qualify and are interested in the job, please send your intro video and updated CV to 
 and we will get in touch with you for a quick interview.

You get to know the needs of the customer, get their requirements, and work with our design team to make mockups and make the sale. You then follow up and nurture leads effectively until you make the sale.

title: BD Pipeline Manager – Construction
description:
BD Pipeline Manager — JLC Construction | U.S. Construction

Lead Mining | Public Works & Permit Research | Bid Board & Calendar Ownership | Pipeline Accountability

Remote (Philippines) | $5–$10/hr Based on Experience | 20 hrs/week to start, growing to 30+



Read This First



This is not a VA role. This is not a data entry job. This is not for someone who waits to be told what to do.



We are looking for a BD Pipeline Manager — someone who hunts leads aggressively, qualifies them thoroughly, manages the full bid operation, and holds everyone in the pipeline accountable — including our U.S.-based BD team.



You will own the pipeline from the 
nt a lead is identified to the 
nt confirmed contact is made. You are the quarterback. If a lead goes cold, that is on you. If a follow-up was missed, that is on you. If the bid board is inaccurate, that is on you.



We want someone who takes that kind of ownership personally — and thrives on it.



If you are not an aggressive, organized, persistent, and resourceful self-starter — please do not apply. This role will not work for you.



About JLC Contracting



JLC Contracting is a U.S.-based construction company specializing in:



- High-End Interior Fit-Outs as Subcontractor or GC/CM

- Division 9 Work (flooring, ceilings, wall finishes, specialty interiors)

- Corporate & Retail Refresh Programs

- Corporate & Retail Re-Branding Projects



Our clients include Corporate Tenants, Retail Brands, Property Managers, Developers, Architects, and Owner's Representatives across the U.S.



We are building a serious BD operation. This role sits at the center of it.



What You Will Own



1. Lead Mining & Qualification

You are not waiting for leads to come to you. You are hunting them every single day across every available source.



Construction Platforms

- Work PlanHub, ConstructConnect, BuildingConnected, and 
 daily

- Monitor project notifications, invitations, and new postings — zero misses

- Identify projects that fit our scope: interior fit-outs, Division 9, corporate/retail refresh and rebrand



Public Works Research

- Search public works websites, government portals, and municipal procurement sites for relevant opportunities

- Identify publicly funded interior, renovation, and fit-out projects before they hit the major platforms

- Track bid solicitations, RFPs, and public contract awards that align with our work



Municipal Permit Research

- Regularly pull permit data from local municipal websites and building departments

- Identify active permits for interior renovations, retail buildouts, office fit-outs, and refresh projects

- Use permit data to get ahead of opportunities — find the project before the GC has even started bidding it out



Apollo (or Equivalent) Outreach

- Build targeted People Lists in Apollo, Lemlist, HubSpot, Outreach, or equivalent platform — Architects, Project Managers, Corporate Real Estate leads, Retail Facilities Managers, Owner's Reps

- Launch and manage outreach sequences, monitor responses, keep data clean



For every lead identified, you complete a full qualification profile:

- Platform or source

- Project type, size, location, timeline

- Decision-maker — name, title, direct contact

- Why this fits JLC's scope

- Prior relationship with this firm — yes or no

- Recommended outreach approach

- Urgency level and bid deadline if applicable



No complete profile = lead does not move forward. No exceptions.



2. Bid Board Ownership

- You own the Bid Board. It is always current, always accurate, always organized.

- Every active bid, pending opportunity, and invitation tracked and updated in real time

- Bid status tracked at every stage: Identified ? Qualified ? Handed Off ? Contact Made ? Bid Submitted ? Won/Lost

- Robert must be able to look at the Bid Board at any 
nt and have a complete, accurate picture



3. Bid Calendar Ownership

- You own the Bid Calendar. Every deadline, submission date, and follow-up date is on it.

- You proactively alert the team to upcoming deadlines — not the day before, well in advance

- Nothing gets missed. No bid deadline slips. No follow-up falls off the calendar.



4. Lead Handoff to U.S.-Based BD

- When a lead is fully qualified and profiled, you hand it off to our U.S.-based BD person with a complete brief

- The handoff includes: company background, decision-maker contact, recommended approach, urgency, and suggested talking points

- You do not drop the lead at handoff. You track it on the Bid Board until confirmed contact is made.



5. U.S. BD Team Accountability

- You follow up with our U.S.-based BD person on every open handoff — on a defined cadence

- If contact has not been made within the agreed timeframe, you escalate to Robert

- You are not subordinate to the U.S. BD person on pipeline tracking — you are the system of record



6. Inbox & Platform Monitoring

- Monitor all construction platforms and relevant inboxes daily

- Flag critical items immediately, handle straightforward follow-ups independently

- Never let a warm lead go cold due to a missed notification or



Requirements — All Non-Negotiable



? Construction BD Experience — You have directly supported BD for a U.S.-based GC, CM, subcontractor, or interior construction company. You understand the bid process, project types, and how decisions get made. Required.



? Construction Lead Platforms — Hands-on experience with at least two of: PlanHub, ConstructConnect, BuildingConnected, 
. You know how to find projects and work these platforms aggressively. If you have never used any of these, do not apply.



? Public Works & Government Research — You know how to navigate public works portals, government procurement sites, and municipal building department websites to find relevant opportunities. This is a core skill for this role.



? Municipal Permit Research — You have pulled permit data from local building departments or municipal websites to identify construction activity and BD opportunities. If you have never done this, tell us — but be honest.



? 
 or Equivalent — You have built lists, launched sequences, and managed campaigns in Apollo, Lemlist, HubSpot, Outreach, or any comparable outreach platform. Describe exactly what you have done and which tool you used.



? Google Sheets — Advanced — You have owned and maintained live trackers. Formulas, conditional formatting, structured data — not basic data entry.



? Written English — Professional — Clean, professional, requires no editing. You draft correspondence independently.



? Pipeline Accountability — You have tracked a BD pipeline and followed up with the people responsible for taking action — including pushing them when they hadn't. You are comfortable holding others accountable professionally and persistently.



? Resourcefulness — You find what you need without being told where to look. If there is a way to find an opportunity, you will find it.



? EST Overlap — Available to work meaningful hours in U.S. Eastern Time.



The Personality We Are Looking For



- You are a hunter — you find opportunities, you don't wait for them

- You are relentlessly organized — you would rather build a better system than let anything slip

- You are persistent without being annoying — you know how to follow up in a way that gets results

- You take ownership — if something is your responsibility, it gets done. Period.

- You are creative and resourceful — you find angles others miss, you dig deeper than everyone else

- You escalate intelligently — you handle what you can and flag what you can't with a clear summary



If people who have worked with you would describe you as a machine — we want to talk to you.



How We Work



You will report directly to Director of Business Development.



Communication

- Primary communication via

- Urgent items via **WhatsApp**

- Responsive during agreed working hours



Daily Rhythm

- Every morning at log-in: brief check-in to the full team — what you are working on, any new leads flagged, anything you need

- Every end of business day: written EOD report — leads mined, bid board updates, follow-ups sent, handoffs pending

- Every end of week: full written weekly summary — pipeline activity, wins, stalls, and plan for the following week



Weekly Review

- Weekly video call with Business Development Team.

- You come prepared — bid board current, weekly summary already submitted



Work Assignment

- You own your day

- Additional tasks assigned via
 or WhatsApp as they come up

- No complicated task software — just clear accountability and consistent output



Compensation & Growth



- $5–$10/hr based on proven experience — we pay more for people who can prove they belong at the top of that range

- Start at 20 hrs/week — grow to 30+ as you prove yourself

- Long-term position — we invest in people who perform and stay

- Performance bonuses tied to pipeline results

- Direct working relationship with Robert Lombardi



- How to Apply — Follow These Instructions Exactly



Submit your resume and answer every question below in full. Any application missing answers to any question will be disqualified immediately. No exceptions.



1. Construction Platform Experience

Which of the following have you used: PlanHub, ConstructConnect, BuildingConnected, 
? For each one, describe specifically what you did — how you found leads, monitored projects, and supported the BD process.



2. Public Works & Permit Research

Have you searched public works portals, government procurement sites, or municipal permit databases to find construction opportunities? Describe exactly what you did and what you were looking for.



3. Construction BD Background

What type of construction company were you supporting? What was your specific role in their BD operation? What did you own?



4. Apollo or Equivalent Outreach Platform

Describe your hands-on experience with Apollo, Lemlist, HubSpot, Outreach, or any equivalent platform. What did you build? What did you manage? What results did you see? Which specific tool did you use?



5. Pipeline Accountability

Have you ever tracked a BD pipeline and followed up with the people responsible for taking action — including pushing them when they hadn't followed through? Describe how you handled that.



6. Google Sheets & Microsoft

Describe the most complex tracker you have built or maintained. What did it track? What was the structure?



7. Resourcefulness

Give one example of a time you found an opportunity or solved a problem by going beyond the obvious — digging deeper, finding a source others wouldn't think to check, or being creative in your research. What did you do and what came of it?



8. Availability & Rate

What hours are you available in U.S. Eastern Time? What is your target hourly rate?



9. The Filter

At the very top of your cover letter, write: "I am a pipeline machine".

Applications without this phrase will not be opened.



We are building something serious. We want someone serious. If that is you — we look forward to hearing from you.

title: Vagaro Setup and Optimization Specialist Med Spa and Wellness
description:
We are seeking an experienced Vagaro specialist to build and optimize our booking system for a medical spa and wellness clinic. This role is focused on execution, clarity, and conversion. The goal is to structure services, promotions, packages, and booking flow in a way that supports revenue while keeping the client experience clean and simple.

This is a project based role with potential for ongoing work.



What You Will Do



You will set up and organize services including IV drips, injections, consults, peptides, and longevity protocols. You will build promotions, monthly specials, packages, and memberships inside Vagaro. You will configure the online booking flow so clients can easily find current offers and book without confusion. You will align service categories with our homepage strategy and ensure pricing, descriptions, and availability are accurate. You will set provider schedules and service durations, test booking on desktop and mobile, and refine the flow for clarity and ease of use. You will collaborate directly with leadership and document the setup for internal reference.



What We Are Looking For



You have proven experience setting up Vagaro for medical spas or wellness clinics. You understand service based booking systems and how promotions and packages work inside Vagaro. You think strategically about user flow and conversions while staying detail oriented. You communicate clearly, work independently, and meet timelines.



Preferred Experience



Experience in a medical spa or wellness clinic environment. Familiarity with IV therapy, injections, peptides, or longevity services. Experience supporting clinics with multiple service categories.



Project Scope and Timing



Initial Vagaro setup and optimization aligned with our homepage and promotions strategy. Testing and refinement of the booking experience. Documentation of final structure for our team. Immediate start with an estimated completion timeline of one to two weeks depending on scope.



How to Apply



Please include your experience with Vagaro, examples of clinics you have set up, and your availability.

title: **???? Media Buyer (Meta & TikTok Ads – Performance Focused)**
description:
We are looking for a highly skilled Media Buyer to take full ownership of our paid advertising across Meta 
 & Instagram) and TikTok.



This is a performance-driven role. We are not looking for someone who just launches campaigns — we need someone who understands how to scale, optimize, and drive profitable results.



You will be responsible for managing and optimizing ad campaigns for our e-commerce brands. Your role will directly impact revenue, so strong decision-making and data analysis are critical.



Your responsibilities will include launching and managing campaigns on Meta and TikTok, testing multiple creatives and angles, monitoring performance daily, scaling winning campaigns, cutting underperforming ads, and making data-driven decisions based on key metrics. You will also be required to collaborate closely with the creative and copy team to improve ad performance and provide clear daily updates on what is working, what is not, and why.



We are looking for someone with proven experience running profitable e-commerce campaigns on Meta and TikTok, strong understanding of key metrics (CPA, CTR, ROAS, CPM), the ability to analyze data and make quick optimization decisions, and experience working with multiple campaigns and budgets. You must be proactive, detail-oriented, and able to work independently without constant supervision.



Bonus if you have experience with scaling campaigns, testing frameworks, and working in fast-paced performance marketing environments.



This role is not suitable for beginners, slow responders, or individuals who require constant guidance. We are looking for someone who takes ownership and delivers results.



We offer long-term collaboration, consistent workload, and the opportunity to grow with a fast-scaling team.



To apply, please send your portfolio or results (screenshots of campaigns, ROAS, or case studies), your experience with Meta and TikTok ads, your daily workflow for managing campaigns, and the tools you use.



Applications without proof of results will not be considered.

title: Integration Support Specialist (AccuLynx Admin)
description:
I am looking for a highly analytical, systems-driven Integration Support Specialist to support our internal Operations & IT team in a growing roofing organization.



This is not a general admin role. I need someone who understands CRM systems at an administrative level, enjoys troubleshooting integrations, and is confident communicating directly with U.S.-based leadership.



If you enjoy solving system challenges, improving processes, and working in a structured operational environment, this role may be a great fit.



About the Role



Our team supports multiple operational systems including CRM, project management, and accounting tools. I am looking for someone who can take ownership of system support, reporting, and integrations, helping keep our operations organized and efficient.



Responsibilities



You will be responsible for:

Managing AccuLynx (user setup, permissions, configurations, and locations)

Troubleshooting system and integration issues

Building and maintaining advanced Excel reports

Managing tickets and support requests through ZoHo Desk

Supporting integrations across SalesRabbit and eventually Sage Intacct

Ensuring data accuracy and consistency across systems

Documenting processes and identifying areas for improvement

Communicating clearly with leadership regarding issues and solutions



Requirements

Strong hands-on experience with AccuLynx (Admin-level preferred)

Advanced Excel skills (pivot tables, formulas, reporting, data cleanup)

Analytical mindset and strong problem-solving skills

Experience working with CRM or operational systems

Strong English communication skills (verbal and written)

Comfortable speaking on camera and joining calls with leadership

Ability to work independently and take ownership of tasks



Nice to Have

Experience with SalesRabbit

Experience with Sage Intacct

Experience with Smartsheet

Familiarity with Microsoft Power BI

Experience using L
 or Vizio



Working Hours

Full-time (40 hours per week)

Must be available during US Eastern Standard Time (EST) business hours



What I’m Looking For

I am looking for someone who:

Is detail-oriented and highly organized

Enjoys working with systems and processes

Can solve problems independently

Communicates clearly and professionally

Takes initiative and looks for ways to improve workflows



What Success Looks Like

Success in this role means:

Confidently managing AccuLynx and related systems

Improving reporting and operational workflows

Helping streamline ticket management and integrations

Becoming a reliable systems specialist for our team

If this sounds like you, I’d love to hear about your experience with AccuLynx and Excel.

title: Senior Level Executive Assistant
description:
I’m looking for a high-performing Executive Partner who can act as my strategic right hand — someone who thrives on structure, communication, and follow-through.



This isn’t a typical “assistant” role. I’m looking for a growth catalyst — a professional who can think strategically, manage systems, and execute with precision so I can stay focused on scaling, sales, design, and client relationships.

Capture and distribute key action items fro
etings.

title: Assistant Contract Analyst
description:
Position Summary



The Assistant Contract Analyst supports the Vice President of Compliance in managing the lifecycle of company contracts and agreements. This role focuses on contract preparation, review, tracking, and compliance oversight to reduce operational and legal risk. The position coordinates across departments to ensure contracts are accurate, compliant, and executed efficiently.



 



Essential Duties and Responsibilities



Assist with drafting, formatting, proofreading, and redlining company contracts and agreements.



Review contracts for accuracy, completeness, and consistency with company standards.



Prepare contract packages using Adobe tools and standardized templates.



Support the VP of Compliance and legal counsel with contract revisions and execution.



Identify missing documentation or contract risks and escalate appropriately.



Ensure contracts comply with applicable state regulations, licensing requirements, and company standards.



 



Technical Skills



Strong proficiency in Adobe Acrobat editing and redlining required.



Proficiency in Microsoft Word contract formatting required.



Excel proficiency required, including the ability to create, manage, and analyze tracking spreadsheets.



Experience with Smartsheet or similar project tracking systems preferred.



Comfort working with digital document management systems.



 



Experience



3 to 5 years of experience in contract administration, compliance, or the construction industry required. Roofing industry experience is strongly preferred.



Education



Bachelor’s degree preferred or equivalent relevant experience.



 



This position description is not intended to be an exhaustive list of duties. Responsibilities may change based on business needs.

title: Licensing and Compliance Coordinator
description:
The Licensing & Compliance Coordinator plays a critical role within the organization by providing administrative and licensing support to the Company and guaranteeing the Company’s compliance with renewing and maintaining corporate, contractor, and local-level licensing. This role will report directly to the VP of Compliance.



 



Responsibilities:



Provide professional licensing support to the company and its subsidiaries and ensure that all required professional licenses are obtained and kept in good standing.



Ensure proper and timely completion of all licensing requirements for Corporate and all Brands, including the preparation and filing of license applications.



Apply for new licenses as needed on a state and local level.



Send and upload COIs to proper licensing offices, localities, and Brand Markets.



Assist the various brands company-wide with the COI platform.



Respond to questions from company personnel regarding licensing requirements.



Maintain up-to-date knowledge of all relevant corporate, state, and federal licensing requirements.



Retain accurate and organized records of all licensing documents.



Provide administrative support to the VP of compliance.



Qualifications:



A minimum of 2 years prior experience in license management, regulatory compliance, or a related field is advantageous.



Knowledge of contractor Licensing and Permitting processes



Excellent written and verbal communication skills



Knowledge of Certificate of Insurance processes and procedures



Strong computer proficiency



Superb attention to detail.



Experience working in a fast-paced environment with changing priorities and goals.



Organized, detailed, and self-motivated.



Ability to multitask and problem-solving.



Works well in a team environment as well as independently.



Demonstrated ability to adapt to new information, research for information, and apply knowledge learned.



Ability to follow directions and complete detailed forms with accuracy.



Strong analytical and detail-oriented aptitude; a high degree of accuracy is required.

title: AUTOMATION & AI OPERATIONS SPECIALIST (Go High Level) · Day Shift (PH Time) · Full-Time
description:
ABOUT ZELIX LABS

We're a specialised AI and messaging automation agency. We build stable, well-governed automation systems for businesses using platforms like GoHighLevel, 
, 
, and n8n.

This is not a volume agency. Not a generic VA setup. We build serious systems and we need serious people to help run them.



WHY THIS ROLE IS DIFFERENT

You work day shift, Philippine time. No graveyard shifts. No odd hours eating into your life.

This is a remote, work-from-home role with a real career path. You'll work with cutting-edge AI and automation tools that most people in the industry are still trying to figure out. If you're the kind of person who likes understanding how things work under the hood, this is your seat.



WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING

You'll be the person keeping client automation systems running smoothly. That means:

- Setting up and configuring GoHighLevel (GHL), 
, and AI conversation agents

- Implementing changes and adjustments based on documented instructions

- Reviewing live setups and flagging issues before they become problems

- Monitoring automations and handling i
 calmly when something breaks

- Triaging issues methodically, applying containment steps, and escalating clearly

- Writing clean i
 summaries, change logs, and internal updates



You will not be answering customer enquiries or managing live chat queues. This is an operations and systems role. Logic, judgment, and ownership are what matter here.



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

We care more about how you think than how many years you've been doing this.

You're the right fit if you:

- Think logically and stay calm when things are unclear

- Write clearly in English

- Take ownership without overstepping

- Are comfortable saying "I'm not sure yet, but here's what I'm checking"

- Learn platforms by actually reading the documentation



Required:

- Strong written English

- Logical problem-solver who can follow and improve SOPs

- Genuine interest in AI agents and automation systems



Strong advantage if you have:

- GoHighLevel experience — especially if you're Admin Certified

- Hands-on experience with Conversation AI inside GHL

- Familiarity with 

- Worked with 
 or n8n for workflow automation

- Bonus: comfort with APIs or basic integrations

Background in tech support, QA, or operations





WHAT THIS ROLE IS NOT

- Not sales

- Not a call centre or live chat job

- Not repetitive copy-paste work



Every day involves judgment calls. You'll be trusted to act on them.



COMPENSATION & DETAILS

- PHP 28000 to 48000 depending on experience

- Day shift, Philippine time — protect your evenings and your sleep

- Fully remote, work from home

- Long-term role -  salary and scope grow as you do

- Structured onboarding with SOPs and training provided





HOW TO APPLY

- Send your CV and a short written answer to this question:

- A loom video of your portfolio/case study

- We're not looking for the perfect answer. We're looking at how you think.



HIRING TIMELINE

Role is immediate. We are currently recruiting. Shortlisted candidates will be notified promptly. Onboarding begins once the right person is confirmed — we move quickly for the right fit.

title: Cold Email & List-Building Virtual Assistant (Therapist Outreach / Telehealth)
description:
**About the Role**  

Insightful Psychiatry is a multi?state telepsychiatry group. We’re looking for a **detail?obsessed Cold
 & List-Building VA** to own therapist outreach: building clean lists, running cold
 campaigns (using AI + Instantly), and managing follow?ups so our schedule stays full.



This is an execution role: you live in spreadsheets, inboxes, and automations and you like hitting daily activity numbers.



### Responsibilities



You will be responsible for:



- **List research & cleaning**

  - Build and maintain therapist / clinician lists from Psychology Today, other directories, and Google.

  - Verify and clean
s to protect deliverability.

  - Segment lists by state, specialty, and practice type.



- **Cold
 setup & execution**

  - Set up and manage cold
 campaigns in Instantly (and similar tools).

  - Use AI tools to draft short, personalized cold
s and follow?ups based on proven templates.

  - Manage basic domain warmup, sending limits, and inbox rotation.



- **Follow?ups & light CRM**

  - Monitor replies, label / tag positive vs neutral vs negative.

  - Log outcomes in Google Sheets (lead source, state, status, notes).

  - Make sure every “interested” therapist is followed up with until they book a call or say no.



- **Reporting & improvement**

  - Daily update of:

    - Leads added  

    -
s sent  

    - Open rate / reply rate  

    - Positive replies / booked calls  

  - Flag problems early (deliverability drops, high bounce rate, etc.) and suggest fixes.

  - Help test subject lines and angles to improve reply rate.



---



### Requirements



- **Must?have experience**

  - 1+ year running cold
 campaigns (not just newsletters).

  - Hands?on with tools like Instantly / Lemlist / Apollo / similar.

  - Strong Google Sheets skills (filters, basic formulas, cleaning data).

  - Comfortable using AI tools (ChatGPT, etc.) to draft and improve copy.



- **Soft skills**

  - Very strong written English.

  - Extremely organized and reliable; you hit your daily numbers.

  - Proactive: you spot issues and propose solutions, not just wait for tasks.

  - Comfortable working with health?related audiences (no clinical work, just outreach).



---



### KPIs (How We’ll Measure You)



- Verified therapist
s added per week  

-
s sent per day (across all inboxes)  

- Open rate and reply rate on campaigns  

- Positive replies and booked partner calls per week  



---



### How to Apply (Read Carefully)



1. Send a short intro: who you are, where you’re based, your internet speed.  

2. In 5–7 sentences, describe one cold
 campaign you’ve run and the results (opens, replies, booked calls).  

3. Write one subject line and one 3?sentence
 you would send to a therapist to invite them to a 15?minute intro call with our practice.



Applications that don’t follow these steps will not be considered.

title: Project Coordinator with CIVIL Experience Only
description:
Role Overview:

Our client is looking for a highly organised and proactive Project Coordinator responsible for supporting the delivery of projects through disciplined administration, documentation, and coordination across all project phases. This role ensures that Project Managers can focus on high-value activities by maintaining the systems, processes, and records that keep commercial and industrial projects on track. The coordinator manages information flow, tracks actions and risks, and ensures nothing falls through the cracks from initiation to completion.



Core Accountabilities

- Scope, Time, Cost & Quality: Coordinate and maintain project scope documentation and schedules while tracking project costs, including claims and variations.

- Commercial & Business Administration: Maintain accurate oversight of the commercial position of each project, ensuring invoicing is current and escalating overdue or at-risk items promptly.

- Project 
ntum: Maintain a current and accurate picture of project status and critical paths, ensuring the team never operates on outdated information.

- Risk & Quality Management: Proactively identify, capture, and report risks early with suggested mitigations, while maintaining defect and quality registers through to resolution.



Key Responsibilities

- Project Coordination & Administration: Record and issue meeting minutes, maintain action registers, and follow up with responsible parties to ensure timely completion.

- Scope & Budget Management: Develop project scope statements and maintain project budgets, processing updates arising from payment claims and approved variations.

- Procurement & Commercial: Prepare and coordinate Requests for Quotation (RFQ) and Tender (RFT), and manage the - - Request for Information (RFI) process.

- Financial Administration: Administer the payment claims process, coordinate monthly invoicing in accordance with milestones, and pursue overdue payments.

- Document & Drawing Management: Manage all project drawings, including filing, version control, and mark-ups, while organizing project photography for reporting purposes.

- HSE Tracking: Administratively track the submission and approval status of Construction Management Plans and HSE communication plans.



Qualifications & Experience

MUST-HAVE Experience

- Proven 4-5 years experience in project coordination or administration specifically within commercial or industrial construction.

- Strong proficiency in the Microsoft 365 environment (Excel, Word, and Outlook).

- Experience with Bluebeam or a comparable PDF editing and markup tool for drawing coordination.

- Demonstrated ability in written communication, specifically in producing meeting minutes, status reports, and scope of works.



Additional Experience

- Experience with project management platforms (experience in MS Project, AutoCAD, Procore, or Aconex is highly regarded).

- Familiarity with payment claim administration and procurement processes (RFI, RFQ, RFT).

- Ability to create and maintain project registers, risk matrices, and schedules.



Please send your resume and portfolio to

title: Technical Staffing Operations Specialist
description:
Job Title: Technical Staffing Operations Specialist (US Government Contracting) 

Salary: $3.00 USD / Hour 

Work Schedule: 8AM-4PM EST 



About the Company



We are Abrahams Consulting LLC, a New York City-based Minority and Women-Owned Business Enterprise (MWBE) specialized in government contracting and staffing. We operate under a strict Quality Management System (QMS) compliant with ISO 9001 standards.



About the Role



We are looking for a meticulous Technical Staffing Operations Specialist to join our team. In this role, you will provide specialized technical staffing support services. Because we serve government agencies, this position requires zero-defect delivery, strict confidentiality, and adherence to Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs).





What You Will Do



1. Government Solicitation Management



Data Acquisition: Systematically gather and verify vendor and opportunity information from the NYC Passport system and similar platforms.



Review: Review incoming government solicitations to identify deliverables with 100?curacy.



Dissemination: Filter and share relevant opportunities with our Vendor Partners (VPs) within set turnaround times.



2. Candidate Processing & Quality Assurance



Resume Vetting: Screen candidate resumes against strict government requirements (mandatory skills, years of experience).



Resume Editing: Format and edit resumes to meet standardized Company and Client presentation standards.



Onboarding: Manage the administrative onboarding process for new Vendor Partners.



Continuous Improvement: Document feedback on submissions to help improve our staffing process.



3. Project Management



Asana Management: Maintain real-time accuracy of project tracking fields in Asana; tasks must be updated daily.



Submission Tracking: Proactively track the status of submitted candidates and log all client communications.



Document Control: Maintain all records in company cloud storage with strict version control (e.g., v1.0, v1.1).





Requirements



ISO 9001 Mindset: You must be willing to strictly follow documented SOPs and Work Instructions.



Attention to Detail: We require zero-defect delivery. If errors occur, you must participate in "Root Cause Analysis" to prevent recurrence.





Tech Savvy: Proficiency in Asana, Cloud Storage, and web-based portals (NYC Passport).





Data Security: You must strictly protect sensitive government data and PII. Data must never be stored on personal devices.





Compensation & Benefits



Rate: $3.00 USD per hour.



Payment: Paid via PayPal in US Dollars.



Evaluation: You will undergo a monitored 90-Day Probationary Assessment Period.



Growth: Successful completion of probation and meeting quality targets constitutes eligibility for a salary grade review.



How to Apply



Please reply with your resume and a brief cover letter explaining your experience with data entry, resume formatting, or project management tools like Asana.

title: Evidence Documentation Support
description:
Job Title: Evidence Documentation Support

Reports to: Senior Legal Assistant

Status: Part Time, Exempt

 

Position Purpose:

This position is for a virtual assistant who can take on a variety of administrative roles in compiling various documents together into one single PDF document and creating an accompanying table of contents. This position may also include additional virtual administrative assistant tasks, as needed.

 

Primary Responsibilities:

- You will receive a list of evidence from the assigned team on the case that is needed for an immigration case. You will create a list of the evidence in the Spanish language and send it to the client via text message and
 (you will first confirm the phone number for the client is correct).

- You will then follow up with the client until we receive the evidence back from the client.

- You will then compile the evidence into different sections, including, but not limited to, the following: biographic information, proof of residence in the United States, proof of payment of taxes, etc. (The categories will be provided to you for each case).

- You will then create an insert to go between each document.

- You will then put all documents together and paginate the documents.

- You will then create a table of contents including each piece of evidence we have received and the page number, separated by categories.



Basic Job Requirements:

- You are a fluent English speaker and can speak conversation Spanish. Preference is given to applicants who are fluent in both Spanish and English.

- You are organized, detail-oriented and able to prioritize.

- Proficient in Microsoft products, SharePoint, Google Docs and Adobe Acrobat.

- You are positive, welcoming, and have a professional demeanor.

- You care about the rights of immigrants in the United States.

- You can follow directions and work within operational systems by following the training guidelines.

- You have a reliable internet connection.

- You are available Monday – Friday between the hours of 8:00 AM and 12:00 PM. EST.  We also have availability, on occasion, on weekends.



Preferred:

- Previous experience as a paralegal

- Fluency in Spanish and English

- Expertise in Microsoft Word and Adobe

- Prior experience researching topics

- Familiarity with Docketwise Case Management

 

Application Details: 

1. Please use this link to apply: 

2. You must put “Starfish TOC Member” in the headline of your application.

3. On the summary, explain your interest for the role, and explain why you are the best candidate for the role.

title: Technical Delivery Manager
description:
We're looking for a Technical Delivery Manager to own the end-to-end delivery of our client integration projects.



You'll be as comfortable reviewing an technical specifications as you are presenting a project status to a steering committee. You'll run the sprints, manage the risks, keep the client informed, and make sure the team has everything they need to deliver great work.



You'll take full ownership of project outcomes - scope, timeline, budget, quality. When things go sideways (and they will), you'll be the one who stays calm, works the problem, and gets things back on track.



What You'll Do



- Run projects end-to-end: from kickoff through go-live and hypercare, across systems integration engagements (primarily MuleSoft)

- Lead Agile delivery: facilitate daily stand-ups, sprint planning, reviews, and retrospectives

- Own the client relationship: deliver status reports, present to steering committees, and manage expectations proactively

- Get into the technical details: review designs, understand integration architecture, and have credible conversations with both developers and client technical leads

- Manage risk: maintain RAID logs, surface issues early, and always come with a recommendation

- Plan capacity: forecast resourcing across projects and coordinate with leadership on team allocation

- Remove blockers: shield the delivery team from noise and make sure they can focus on building



What We're Looking For



- 5+ years delivering IT projects in a consulting or professional services environment

- Bachelor's degree (engineering background a plus)

- Solid understanding of systems integration patterns — APIs, messaging, ETL, event-driven architecture

- Scrum certification or demonstrable Agile delivery experience

- Experience managing project budgets, timelines, and resource allocation

- Excellent written and verbal English communication

- Comfortable presenting to senior stakeholders, including C-suite and steering committees



Why Performent Consulting



- Real ownership: you won't be a cog in a machine. You'll own your projects and have a direct impact on client outcomes and company growth.

- Technical depth: we're a consulting firm that cares about engineering quality, not just billable hours.

- Growth trajectory: we're scaling, and this role has a clear path to Head of Delivery, Practice Lead, or Client Partner.

- Flexible and remote: work from anywhere in the APAC region. We trust our people to manage their time.

- Small team, big clients: enterprise-grade work without the enterprise-grade bureaucracy.



To Apply

If you are someone who takes extreme ownership and loves to ensure that the client is happy and the team can perform to their highest potential, we'd love to hear from you. Please apply on the OnlineJobs platform AND fill in this application form:

title: US Healthcare Recruiter
description:
Job Description: Part-Time Healthcare Recruiter (20 Hours/Week)

Location: Remote 

Schedule: Flexible, 20 hours per week 

Industry: Healthcare Staffing 

Reports to: Operations Director

Pay Range: $5–$6 USD per hour



Overview

We are seeking a dynamic and results-driven Part-Time Healthcare Recruiter to join our growing team. In this role, you will manage the full-cycle recruitment process for U.S.-based healthcare professionals, connecting top talent with leading healthcare organizations across the United States. This is a remote opportunity ideal for someone passionate about healthcare staffing and skilled in sourcing, screening, and placing qualified candidates.



Key Responsibilities

- Manage full-cycle recruitment for U.S. healthcare professionals including nurses, therapists, medical technologists, and other allied health professionals and support staff, including Virtual Medical and Operations Assistants.

- Collaborate with U.S. clients to understand staffing needs, job requirements, and ideal candidate profiles.

- Source candidates through job boards, social media, referrals, and other creative channels.

- Conduct initial screenings, interviews, and assessments to evaluate candidate qualifications.

- Coordinate client interviews, feedback, and offer negotiations.

- Ensure compliance with U.S. healthcare hiring standards and credentialing requirements.

- Maintain accurate records in the applicant tracking system (ATS).

- Build and nurture a pipeline of healthcare and support talent for current and future openings.



 Qualifications

- Proven experience in US healthcare recruitment. 

- Familiarity with U.S. healthcare roles, licensing, and credentialing processes.

- Strong communication and interpersonal skills.

- Ability to work independently and manage multiple requisitions.

- Tech-savvy with experience using ATS platforms and sourcing tools.

- Excellent organizational and time management skills.



 Preferred Skills

- Experience recruiting Clinic Staff, Registered Nurses (RN), Registered Dietitians (RD), Personal Trainers, or other licensed healthcare professionals.

- Knowledge of U.S. employment laws and healthcare staffing regulations.

- Background in international recruitment or remote hiring is a plus.



What We Offer

- Flexible part-time schedule (20 hours/week)

- Remote work environment

- Competitive hourly rate of $6 USD

- Opportunity to make a meaningful impact in healthcare staffing

- Supportive and collaborative team culture

title: AI-First Community Builder & Course Creator
description:

AI Integraterz is on a mission to help 1,000 people get placed with American companies as AI-first Virtual Assistants in the next 6 months. We’re building a Skool community, a certification program, and a course platform to make that happen — and we need the right person to help us grow it.



This is a front-facing, content-driven, community-first role. You will be the heart of our Skool group, the voice of our courses, and the person who makes sure every member knows their next step.



What You'll Do

Build, polish, maintain, and upgrade our courses inside our Skool community

Grow and publish in our free Skool group daily — posts, threads, engagement, replies

Welcome new members personally, answer questions, keep people moving forward

Track where members are in their certification journey and help them reach the next step

Have upgrade conversations — guide members from the free group into the paid program

Create lead magnets using our AI tools and content systems

Gather screenshots, case studies, and testimonials daily for content

Record YouTube videos and short-form content — you are on camera and proud of it

Use our AI systems to automate your own workflows so you can focus on people and content



You Are a Great Fit If You Are...

Already obsessed with AI — you use it every day and want to go even deeper

Comfortable and excited to be on camera — YouTube, training videos, walkthroughs

A people person — you genuinely love helping others grow and reach their goals

Community-oriented — you want to build something real, not just manage a page

Content-driven — you want to build your own brand while building ours

Mission-aligned — helping Filipinos land jobs in the AI era matters to you personally

Excited to learn and use Claude Code and be certified on cutting-edge AI tools

Self-directed — you do not need to be told what to do every day



This Is Not the Right Role If You...

Are not comfortable being on camera or recording yourself

Prefer quiet task work over interacting with a community

Are skeptical about AI or just starting to explore it for the first time

Need heavy daily direction and a rigid checklist to function



Requirements

Excellent written and verbal English communication

title: HIRING Full-Time Static Designer for 7 Figures Footwear Brand
description:
About Us

We’re a fast-growing DTC brand in the footwear space, scaling to 30K days with performance-driven creatives. Every ad we launch is backed by data and crafted to convert. We’re looking for a static designer who not only edits but also thinks like a marketer - someone who wants to grow, push limits, and create winning ads at scale.



The Role

We’re hiring a Static Designer who can consistently deliver high-performing Meta static ads (2 formats). This is a long-term, remote role with $4 start salary which increase if hit rate is on target. Also introducing performance bonuses in 2nd month.



What You’ll Do

- Edit high-converting ads for Meta & Pinterest (2 formats)

- Apply strong hooks, pacing, captions, and transitions

- Work with AI-generated content

- Analyze performance data & iterate quickly based on KPIs

- Collaborate closely with the Creative Manager + other editors to push volume

- Source raw footage to bring concepts to life

- Experiment with new formats, trends, and storytelling angles



You Need

- Experience editing performance-driven Meta ads (UGC/direct response)

- Proven portfolio of short-form, direct response ads

- Strong creative eye and ability to deliver 15 ad concepts per week (150 statics)

- Understanding of marketing psychology, hooks, and consumer behavior

- Hunger to grow — willing to test, fail, and iterate fast



What You’ll Get

- Base salary: $4 per hour (start salary that increases if performance is on target) + performance bonuses

- Fully remote role

- Direct collaboration with a high-performing editors, strategists and Founder

- Managed under a dedicated Creative Manager who oversees editors and strategy



How to Apply

Send us a link to your portfolio or past performance ads

title: Marketing Content & Design
description:
Bud Ecosystem is building the next generation enterprise AI infrastructure. We are a growing company that values innovation, clarity, and impact. As we scale our marketing function, we need a creative and detail-oriented virtual assistant to help us produce corporate-quality collateral that reflects our brand identity across every touchpoint.



We are looking for a skilled Virtual Assistant to support the Head of Global Marketing in producing high-quality sales and marketing materials, advertising assets, and presentations. This role is ideal for a self-starter who combines strong design sensibility with marketing awareness and thrives on translating brand guidelines into polished, professional deliverables.

You will be a core part of our marketing build-out, working closely with leadership to ensure every piece of collateral meets a corporate standard and is consistently aligned with Bud Ecosystem’s brand identity.



Sales & Marketing Collateral

• Design and produce sales decks, one-pagers, case studies, brochures, and product sheets.

• Create and maintain templates for repeatable collateral (pitch decks, partner materials, leave-behinds).

• Support the development of sales enablement assets that empower the go-to-market team.

• Adapt existing content for different audiences, channels, and use cases while maintaining brand consistency.



Advertising & Campaign Assets

• Design digital ad creatives for paid social, display, and
 campaigns.

• Produce banner ads, social media graphics, and promotional visuals to spec.

• Resize, reformat, and version assets across platforms and placements.

• Collaborate with the marketing team to translate campaign briefs into compelling visual assets.



Presentations

• Build and refine executive presentations, investor decks, and internal briefing materials.

• Ensure consistent use of brand fonts, colors, imagery, and layout standards.

• Turn rough outlines or speaker notes into polished, narrative-driven slide decks.



Brand Stewardship

• Maintain and enforce brand guidelines across all produced materials.

• Organize and manage a shared library of brand assets, templates, and approved imagery.

• Flag deviations from brand standards and recommend corrections proactively.



Requirements: Must-Have

• 2+ years of experience producing marketing or sales collateral in a professional or agency setting.

• Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign).

• Working proficiency in Canva and Google Workspace (Slides, Docs, Sheets).

• Excellent eye for layout, typography, color, and visual hierarchy.

• Ability to work from brand guidelines and produce materials that are immediately corporate-ready.

• Strong organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple deliverables and deadlines.

• Professional written communication in English.



Requirements: Nice-to-Have

• Experience in B2B, SaaS, or technology marketing environments.

• Familiarity with partner marketing and co-branded materials.

• Basic motion graphics or video editing skills 

• Experience with marketing automation or CMS platforms.

• Portfolio demonstrating corporate brand work across multiple asset types.



What Success Looks Like

• Every deliverable is polished, on-brand, and ready for external distribution without revision loops.

• Turnaround times are reliable, and you proactively flag bottlenecks or capacity issues.

• The sales and marketing team has a growing library of high-quality, reusable assets.

• Brand consistency improves measurably across all customer-facing materials.

title: Paid Ads Manager
description:
Position Overview



We are seeking a detail-oriented and analytical Paid Ads Manager / Agency Manager to oversee our law firm’s paid marketing efforts. This role is responsible for managing relationships with external advertising agencies, monitoring performance metrics, and ensuring all paid campaigns align with ethical standards and business objectives. The ideal candidate has strong experience in paid digital advertising, agency coordination, and KPI-driven performance management.

Agency Oversight:

Supervise all paid advertising agencies (Google Ads,
/Meta, LinkedIn, etc.)

Conduct regular check-ins and strategy sessions with agency partners

Ensure agencies have the resources, assets, and information they need to succeed

Performance Monitoring:

Track and analyze key performance indicators (KPIs), including:

Cost per Lead (CPL)

Cost per Opportunity (CPO)

Cost per Deal (CPD)

Evaluate campaign effectiveness and ensure metrics are meeting targets or trending positively

Prepare performance reports and present key findings to the Director of Marketing

Creative Review and Compliance:

Review and approve all ad creatives and copy before launch

Ensure all advertising materials comply with legal marketing ethics and internal protocols

Collaborate with legal and compliance teams when necessary

Strategic Input:

Provide insights and recommendations to improve ad performance and ROI

Stay up-to-date with platform changes, advertising trends, and regulatory requirements

Contribute to the overall growth strategy of the firm’s marketing department

Qualifications



Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Advertising, Communications, or related field

3+ years of experience managing paid ad campaigns (law firm or professional services experience preferred)

Experience working with or managing marketing agencies

Proficient in paid media platforms (Google Ads, Meta Business Suite, LinkedIn Ads, etc.)

Strong analytical skills with experience using reporting tools (Google Analytics, Looker Studio, etc.)

Excellent communication and project management skills

Familiarity with legal advertising rules and ethical guidelines is a plus

Preferred Skills



Experience with CRM and lead tracking tools (e.g., HubSpot, Salesforce)

Ability to manage budgets and allocate spend for maximum ROI

Knowledge of A/B testing, landing page optimization, and retargeting strategies

title: Client Success Strategist/Digital Accounts Manager
description:
Role overview







The Digital Account Manager is the main point of contact for a portfolio of childcare and early years clients. Your job is to build trust, protect delivery quality, and keep every account moving forward with clarity and 
ntum. You will translate business goals into practical marketing plans, coordinate internal specialists, and make sure clients feel supported, informed, and confident in our work.



This is a relationship led role with strong operational discipline. You are expected to manage expectations, spot risks early, and communicate with warmth and authority. You will be accountable for retention, client satisfaction, and the smooth running of campaigns across paid ads, website work, content, and lead generation.



Key outcomes



Clients stay with us longer because they feel understood, guided, and well looked after



Campaigns are delivered on time with clear priorities and minimal rework



Clients understand what we are doing, why we are doing it, and what is happening next



Performance is reported honestly with insights and clear recommendations



The internal team is protected from chaos through good planning and strong communication



Responsibilities



Own the client relationship from onboarding through renewal



Run structured onboarding to understand the nursery’s priorities, capacity, location, fee structure, and enrolment goals







Turn goals into a clear marketing plan and translate that plan into deliverable tasks for the team



Lead client calls and meetings with confidence, strong agenda control, and clear follow ups



Coordinate work across paid media, creative, copy, SEO, web, and strategy







Keep the client informed without overwhelming them, balancing transparency with simplicity



Track performance and provide reporting that is accurate, meaningful, and actionable



Manage budgets and ensure paid media spend aligns with lead targets and seasonal demand



Spot issues early such as low lead quality, slow follow up, weak enquiry handling, or limited nursery capacity and raise them with solutions







Protect delivery by managing scope, avoiding last minute requests, and controlling priorities



Upsell and cross sell when it is genuinely in the client’s best interest



Work closely with leadership on retention, renewals, and account growth



Maintain clean documentation including notes, actions, timelines, and campaign plans



What great looks like in this role







You can speak fluently about the realities of nurseries, occupancy, waiting lists, term time demand, and parent decision making



You are calm, structured, and proactive even when a client is stressed



You manage expectations early so delivery stays clean and the team can do great work



You ask sharp questions and can identify the real problem behind what a client is requesting



You make clients feel cared for while still holding boundaries



You create 
ntum through consistent progress, not bursts of activity



Skills and experience







Proven experience managing client accounts in a marketing agency environment



Strong communication skills with the ability to lead calls and handle difficult conversations



Confident project coordination with an eye for detail and deadlines



Commercial awareness including retention, margin, and growth opportunities



Comfortable discussing paid advertising performance and basic funnel metrics



Strong writing skills for clear follow ups, briefs, and reporting



Ability to manage multiple accounts while keeping quality high



Experience in education, childcare, local services, or lead generation is a strong advantage



Personal qualities







Warm, professional, and genuinely client centered



Highly organized and naturally dependable



Assertive when needed and comfortable holding boundaries



Solutions focused and calm under pressure



Curious and coachable with a desire to improve







You will be part of a specialist agency focused entirely on helping nurseries and childcare settings grow sustainably. We care about doing the fundamentals exceptionally well, communicating clearly, and delivering work that genuinely improves enquiry volume and enrolments. You will be supported by a team of specialists and expected to lead accounts with maturity, structure, and care.
