title: Elementor Website Builder (Full-Time)
description:
We run a web design agency in the US that builds websites for home service contractors. Since 2014, we have worked with a team in the Philippines, and value the culture very much. 



We currently need a full-time Elementor builder to produce client websites from designs that are already approved.



This is not a design role. You will not be making creative decisions or choosing layouts. You will receive a fully approved website design as a live HTML preview you can view in your browser, along with all the written content, images, brand colors, and fonts. Your job is to take that approved design and rebuild it in WordPress using Elementor Pro. Accurately, efficiently, and with clean structure.



The design is done. You are the person who brings it to life in Elementor.





What you will do every day:



- Open an approved website preview side by side with Elementor and build the homepage to match it as closely as possible

- Copy and paste pre-written content into each section (all copy is provided to you)

- Upload and place images into the correct sections (all images are provided and sized)

- Set up the color palette, fonts, and spacing to match the approved design

- Build inner pages (About, Services, Contact, Service Area) following the same design style

- Make sure every page is fully mobile responsive

- Use proper heading structure: one H1 per page, H2s for sections, H3s for subsections

- Test the site on desktop, tablet, and mobile before marking it complete

- Make revisions when our team or the client requests changes





What we give you for every project:



- A live preview URL showing the exact approved design

- All page content (headlines, body text, CTAs) written and ready to paste in

- All images sized and ready to upload

- Brand colors as hex codes and font names

- A structured handoff document listing everything you need

- Pre-built Elementor template sections you can import and customize





You need to have:



- At least 2 years of hands-on experience building websites in WordPress with Elementor Pro

- Strong attention to detail. You can look at a design and match it closely in Elementor without needing someone to hold your hand through it.

- Solid understanding of responsive design. Sites need to look great on all screen sizes.

- Understanding of basic SEO structure. Proper heading hierarchy (H1, H2, H3), alt text on images, clean page structure.

- Reliable internet and a computer that can run WordPress smoothly

- Ability to work during or overlap with US Central Time hours

- Good English communication. You will get instructions and give updates through chat.





Bonus (not required):



- Experience with Elementor template kits or reusable section templates

- Experience building sites for home service companies like contractors, plumbers, or roofers

- Knowledge of page speed optimization (image compression, keeping plugins minimal)

- Familiarity with WordPress plugins like Yoast SEO, WPForms, Smush, or ShortPixel





What this role is not:



- Not a graphic design job. You will not be designing layouts from scratch.

- Not a content writing job. All copy is written before it reaches you.

- Not a development job. No custom PHP, no theme development, no coding.

- Not a one-time project. This is ongoing full-time work with a steady flow of sites to build.





How our process works:



1. Our design tool generates a website preview and the client approves it

2. Our content team writes all the page copy

3. We put together a handoff package with the preview, content, images, and brand details

4. You build it in Elementor (target is 2 to 4 hours per homepage, 1 to 2 hours per inner page)

5. Our team reviews your build against the approved design

6. You make any adjustments needed

7. Site goes live



We expect to start with 2 to 3 websites per week and grow from there. This is a long-term position for someone who wants stable, consistent work with a growing agency.



Pay: $800 to $1,200 USD per month depending on experience and speed. Paid weekly through Wise or PayPal.



Schedule: Full-time, 40 hours per week. Hours are flexible but you need overlap with US Central Time for communication.





How to apply:



Do not send a generic application. Include the following:



1. A link to 2 or 3 websites you personally built in Elementor.

2. How many years you have been using Elementor specifically.

3. On average, how long does it take you to build a homepage in Elementor when you already have the design and content provided?

4. What is your favorite Elementor feature and why?

5. Write the word "builder" at the top of your application so I know you read this entire post.



We read every application that follows these instructions. Looking forward to hearing from you.

title: Director of Digital Operations & AI Product Launch (Integrator)
description:
I’m building and scaling a multi-brand ecosystem across publishing, AI products, wellness, and curriculum. The ideas and assets exist. The problem is execution at scale.

I’m looking for a senior-level operator who can own the execution of multiple tech-heavy, revenue-focused projects—from AI chatbots and digital funnels to telehealth and curriculum platforms.

If you’ve run complex digital launches, managed cross-functional teams, and turned chaos into shipped products and recurring revenue, keep reading.

You are not a VA, “online assistant,” or someone who only takes orders.

You are the person who can take goals ? design a plan ? drive people and tech until it’s live and producing results.

________________________________________

Core Projects You’ll Help Execute (First 6–12 Months)

You won’t do every task yourself—but you’ll be responsible for making sure these move from “in progress” to “live and producing”:

• Thug Series GPT – AI assistant + funnel for a bestselling Street Lit universe.

• SmartClient Bots – AI/automation builds for clients using tools like GoHighLevel and GPT.

• MyCondolences – Tech-enabled condolence/memorial service (potential pet pivot).

• Walk In Wellness Virtual Clinic / TPA – Telehealth front-end, intake, and provider onboarding systems.

• Transform Curriculum – Digital/self-paced curriculum portal for schools and programs.

• NWNOI Funnel Launch – Donations + book sales + simple nurturing flows.

• Publishing CEO / New Book Releases – Launch systems for new titles.

• W.C. Global Strategy Offers – Strategy/consulting offers with clear funnels and onboarding.

________________________________________

Key Outcomes (First 90 Days)

In your first 90 days, success looks like:

• Clarity & Plan

o Each of the priority projects above has:

? A simple, written roadmap

? Defined milestones

? Owners for each task (you, me, VAs, vendors)

• Shipped Assets

o At least 2–3 offers/funnels are live and capable of collecting leads and payments (e.g., W.C. Global Strategy offer, SmartClient Bots, Thug Series GPT beta).

• Operational Rhythm

o A weekly reporting system:

? What was done

? What’s blocked

? What’s next

o Clear expectations for VAs and contractors.

I’m not interested in “activity.” I’m interested in shipped, working systems.

________________________________________

Responsibilities

• Project & Operations Leadership

o Turn high-level goals into clear project plans, timelines, and weekly priorities.

o Coordinate across me, designers, VAs, devs, and specialists.

o Keep multiple projects moving without dropping details.

• Digital & AI Product Execution

o Oversee the setup of AI tools (GPT-based products, bots, automation flows).

o Work with technical implementers to configure and test:

? Chatbots / GPT flows

? GoHighLevel automations

? Landing pages, payment links, and onboarding sequences.

• Launch & Funnel Management

o Plan and oversee launches for:

? Consulting offers (W.C. Global Strategy)

? Book and IP-based products

? AI-based services (SmartClient Bots, Thug Series GPT)

o Coordinate
 campaigns, simple ads, and basic analytics.

• Systems & Documentation

o Create and refine SOPs so projects can be handed off and scaled.

o Clean up and simplify our existing project trackers so everyone knows what matters now.

• Reporting & Accountability

o Run a weekly check-in:

? Status by project

? Bottlenecks and decisions needed

? Risks and tradeoffs

o Hold tea
mbers (and me) accountable to agreed priorities.

________________________________________

Must-Haves

• Proven experience running multi-project digital operations:

o Agency, online education, SaaS, or info-product background is ideal.

• You’ve launched offers/funnels before:

o You understand the basic pieces: offer ? landing page ? checkout ? delivery ? follow-up.

• Strong familiarity with AI + automation tools, such as:

o ChatGPT/GPT-based products

o GoHighLevel (or similar CRMs/automation tools)

o Basic API/automation logic (you don’t need to write code, but you need to think like a builder).

• You can plan AND execute:

o You’re comfortable writing a roadmap and then getting into the tools or directing others to finish.

• You are direct, organized, and comfortable in a fast-moving environment.

o This is not a corporate, slow-moving culture.

________________________________________

Nice-to-Haves

• Experience in any of these domains:

o Publishing / authors / book launches

o Mental health / telehealth / wellness services

o Curriculum / EdTech

• Experience managing:

o Remote teams

o VAs and specialized freelancers

o Light ad spend (Meta, Amazon Ads, Google)

________________________________________

Working Style & Expectations

• Remote, flexible, but with agreed core hours for communication.

• You’re comfortable with voice/video check-ins and written updates.

• You bring solutions, not just problems:

o “Here’s the issue, here are 2–3 options, here’s my recommendation.”

________________________________________

How to Apply



Step 1 – Loom Video (Required)

Send a 3–5 minute Loom video where I can see you and hear you clearly in English. In the video, cover:



Who you are & your background



Brief intro (who you are, what you do, what types of clients/businesses you’ve worked with).



The most complex digital/AI product or funnel you’ve helped ship



What the product/funnel was.



What tools were involved (GPT/AI, GoHighLevel or similar, automations, platforms).



Your exact role and what you personally owned and drove to completion.



Any numbers or concrete outcomes (launch size, revenue, leads, show-up rate, etc., if you can share).



Why you’re a fit for this kind of role



How you handle multiple projects at once.



How you keep yourself and a team organized and accountable.



Your availability (part
-time) and ideal monthly retainer range.



Please share the Loom link in your
 (no attachments).



Step 2 –
 with Supporting Details



Along with your Loom link,
 me with:



A link to your LinkedIn profile.



2–3 examples (or short descriptions) of relevant projects you’ve worked on:



Launches



Automations



AI tools / GPT products



Funnels / offers you helped ship



Your typical monthly retainer range for this level of responsibility (part-time or full-time) and your earliest start date.

title: Publisher / Publishing Operations Manager
description:

We’re looking for an experienced Publisher / Publishing Operations Manager to help run day-to-day publishing operations for our growing book company. This role works directly with the CEO and requires someone who understands the full publishing lifecycle and can manage projects independently with minimal supervision.



This is not an entry-level role. We’re seeking a detail-oriented professional with real publishing experience, strong execution skills, and the ability to keep multiple book projects moving forward on schedule.

- Manage book projects from manuscript to publication and release

- Coordinate with editors, designers, formatters, and marketing partners

- Prepare, upload, and manage titles on Amazon KDP, IngramSpark, and other publishing platforms

- Direct experience managing multiple book projects simultaneously

- Working knowledge of Amazon KDP and IngramSpark (uploads, metadata, revisions, updates)

- Strong organizational and project-management skills

- Excellent written communication skills (author-facing)

Nice to Have:

- Experience working with independent or hybrid publishers

- Familiarity with ISBNs, metadata optimization, and print/digital formats

- Experience coordinating book launches and marketing timelines

title: Paid Ads Operator/ Media Buyer — Meta Ads + Google Ads (E-Commerce / DTC)
description:
We run multiple direct-to-consumer e-commerce brands on Shopify, scaling through paid Meta and Google advertising. We need a detail-oriented ads operator who can execute inside ad accounts with speed, accuracy, and an understanding of WHY things are structured the way they are.

This is an execution role, not a strategy role. You'll receive creative direction, campaign structures, and scaling decisions from the founder and creative team. Your job is to execute flawlessly inside Meta Ads Manager and Google Ads, upload creatives correctly, monitor performance daily, and flag issues fast.

What You'll Do:

— Upload static and video ad creatives into Meta Ads Manager following exact naming conventions and campaign structures provided

— Set up Dynamic Creative Tests (DCTs) and CBO campaigns with concept-based ad sets as directed

— Schedule ad launches correctly (midnight in ad account timezone)

— Duplicate winning ads and move them to scaling campaigns (Champions ad set structure)

— Set up and manage Google Ads campaigns (Performance Max, Search, Shopping)

— Monitor daily performance: ROAS, CPA, CTR, CPM, hook rate, hold rate, frequency, spend velocity

— Flag creative fatigue early (rising frequency, declining CTR, dropping ROAS)

— Provide concise daily or weekly performance summaries with clear call-outs on winners, losers, and what needs attention

— Track learning phase status and flag when too many ads are stuck in learning

— Maintain strict naming conventions and keep the ad account clean and organized

— Ensure creative diversity across the account (different formats, angles, avatars — not 15 variations of the same image)

Requirements (Non-Negotiable):

— 1–2+ years hands-on experience running Meta Ads for e-commerce or DTC brands (not lead gen, not local business, not boosted posts)

— Working experience with Google Ads (Performance Max and Shopping at minimum)

— Understands CBO vs ABO and when each is used

— Knows how to set up and read DCT breakdown data to identify winning creative variables

— Understands creative diversity and why similar-looking ads get penalized by Meta's algorithm

— Comfortable reading ad metrics: ROAS, CPA, CTR, CPM, hook rate, hold rate, frequency

— Familiar with broad targeting as a primary prospecting approach (no interest stacking)

— Fluent English (written communication must be clear)

— Reliable internet and available during some overlap with US Eastern timezone

— Works independently once given clear direction

Nice to Have:

— Experience with 
 or bulk ad upload tools

— Familiarity with Foreplay.co

— Understanding of ad-to-landing-page message match

— Experience managing multiple brands simultaneously

Compensation:

— $
/month base depending on experience and hours

— Performance bonuses tied to account KPIs

— Clear path to increased comp as brands scale

To Apply — You Must Include All of the Following:



A 2–3 sentence intro about your e-commerce ad experience

A screenshot or Loom video walkthrough of an ad account you've managed (blur sensitive data — we want to see structure, naming conventions, and organization)

Your timezone and daily availability

Your expected monthly rate

Answer this question: "An ad set in your testing campaign has been live for 3 days. One ad has taken 85% of the spend but ROAS is below target. The other two ads have barely spent. What do you do and why?"

title: Video Editor – Experience Working With Major Brands (3+ Years)
description:
EDITOR — VIDEO AD CREATIVES

Niche: Beauty / Skincare (Korean-inspired Anti-Aging)

We're looking for a Performance Editor to cut high-converting video ad creatives for Meta 
 & Instagram), primarily from UGC footage, hooks, and raw content.

Our brand is in the beauty and skincare space and we are only hiring editors with 2+ years of experience in performance video editing, direct response ads, or social media content editing.

This is NOT a "make things look cinematic" job. This is a marketing-first editing role. Every cut, every caption, every transition exists to stop the scroll and drive the click.

You will receive from our Creative Strategist: briefs, hooks, raw footage, UGC clips, voiceovers, and reference ads. Your job is to turn these into multiple creative variations built for testing and scaling.

WHAT YOU WILL DO

You will edit video ad creatives for Meta feeds, stories, and reels. You will cut hook variations from the same raw footage. You will add captions, motion text, and on-screen callouts that drive clarity and attention. You will produce multiple variations from a single brief. You will maintain a fast revision turnaround and keep files organized. You will work closely with the Creative Strategist — briefs come from them, performance feedback loops back to them.

HOW WE EVALUATE YOUR WORK

We look at whether you can make the first 2-3 seconds impossible to scroll past. We look at whether you can turn one piece of footage into multiple distinct variations. We look at whether you prioritize message clarity over visual complexity. We look at whether you can follow a brief precisely and iterate fast. We look at whether you produce volume without sacrificing quality.

EXPECTED OUTPUT

You should be able to deliver multiple finalized edits and variations per week, execute fast revisions based on performance data, and maintain clean organized project files.

YOU HAVE TO HAVE EXPERIENCE WITH:

Using AI softwares to create AI avatars, AI b-roll clips, AI voiceovers and many more. You have to be very familiar with AI and interested in learning more about it and how to integrated more into your work.

TOOLS

We use CapCut, Adobe Premiere, or equivalent. Notion for task management and communication.

IN ADDITION to base pay, you will receive performance-based bonuses on winning Meta ads.

IMPORTANT

Please apply only if you have at least 2 years of relevant experience in video editing for paid ads or performance content. Include samples of ad creatives, UGC edits, or Meta video ads in your application. No portfolio = no review.

title: Business Development Administrator
description:
Job Title: Business Development Administrator

About the role

Bonus Trading is a leading UK-based packaging solutions provider, delivering custom, eco-friendly, and cost-effective packaging products across industries including e-commerce, logistics, and food distribution. We pride ourselves on exceptional customer support, in-depth product knowledge, and a deep commitment to sustainable practices.

We are seeking a Business Development Administrator to support the New Business/Business Development team.



Key responsibilities



Administrative & Operational Support

• Provide day-to-day administrative support to the New Business/Business Development team

• Maintain and update CRM systems (HubSpot) with new opportunities, deals, tasks contacts and activity records

• Prepare sales documentation including proposals, presentations, contracts and onboarding paperwork

• Action document templates and pricing schedules

• Coordinate internal approvals and ensure documentation is accurate and complete



Pipeline & Reporting Support

• Track new business opportunities and maintain accurate pipeline records

• Support the team with data analysis and reporting for forecasting and planning

• Ensure data quality within CRM and other sales systems



Coordination & Internal Communication

• Schedule meetings, internal briefings and pipeline review sessions

• Coordinate information between sales, finance, operations and other internal teams

• Assist with the preparation of tender submissions and new business proposals

• Support onboarding administration for newly won clients



Process & Organisation

• Maintain organised records of proposals, contracts and sales documentation

• Help develop and improve internal processes for managing new business opportunities

• Ensure compliance with company procedures and approval processes



What we’re looking for

• Previous experience in an administrative or sales support role

• Strong organisational and time management skills

• Excellent written and verbal communication skills

• High attention to detail and accuracy

• Data analysis and reporting skills

• Able to work effectively independently, as well as part of a team

• IT proficiency, including Microsoft Office and CRM systems

• Experience in business development or sales environment (desirable)

• Knowledge of tendering or bid processes (desirable)

title: Advanced Excel Automation Specialist (VBA & Logic Engine Expert)
description:

Key Qualifications & Responsibilities:



• Plug & Play Integration: Build a system where raw data (Crew Rosters & Gap Reports) can be pasted and processed instantly via Power Query or VBA.



• Logical Planning Formulas: Automate training schedules based on "Work Instructions" (e.g., syncing with Sign-on/Sign-off dates).



• Operational Conflict Logic: Create formulas that prevent critical personnel (e.g., Driller & Asst. Driller) from being scheduled for training simultaneously.



• Financial Dashboards: Automated budget forecasting and cost-saving trackers.

Please provide:

2. A brief explanation of how you would automate a "Conflict-Check" for two critical roles on opposite shifts.



Note: This is a project-based gig. Final compensation will be discussed directly based on technical proficiency.



Skills Required:

Software Development

Excel

VBA

Power Query

Data Analysis

Project Management)

title: AI-Powered Video Editor
description:
About us

We are a UK-based e-commerce business selling home improvement and building materials products On eCommerce marketplaces. Our products solve real problems for homeowners -and we need someone who can turn that into compelling video content that educates, converts, and scales.

This is a remote, output-based role. We are not counting your hours. We are counting your videos.





What you will be doing

-Producing AI-assisted videos across four formats: TikTok vertical short-form, YouTube Shorts, YouTube long-form educational, and Amazon listing video

-Researching existing content and competitor videos for each product, then using AI tools to build original, on-brand videos around our products

-Creating educational, benefit-driven content -how to install, why it works, what makes it better, and how a homeowner can do it themselves

-Adding English also Polish  language voiceover to all videos -clear, natural, and suited to the platform

-Delivering a consistent weekly volume of finished videos ready to post -the more output, the better

-Iterating based on feedback until the format and style is locked, then scaling that formula

If you are serious about this role, start your application with the words -content that converts.





Requirements

-Proven experience editing video for social media or e-commerce -portfolio required, show us real work

-Strong working knowledge of AI video tools -clearly state in your reply which tools you use: CapCut, Runway, HeyGen, ElevenLabs, Pictory, or others

-Ability to produce clean English voiceover -either your own voice or AI-generated, but it must sound natural and professional

-Self-driven and output-focused -this role is measured by videos delivered per week, not hours logged

-Ability to work independently from a brief, research the product, and produce without hand-holding

-Experience with home improvement, DIY, construction, or product demonstration content is a strong plus and will be prioritised

-Familiarity with Asana or similar task management tools



Please State what kind of AI tools you need to have access to successfully execute

title: Online Math/Science Teacher(Near-Native Accent)
description:
About Pomelo Academy

Pomelo Academy is an innovative online international school dedicated to delivering high-quality education to students worldwide. We provide a dynamic and engaging learning environment, catering to individualized instruction that transcends geographical boundaries.



Job Description

We are seeking passionate and experienced Near-Native English-speaking Online K-12 Math and/or Science Teachers with verifiable teaching certifications. The ideal candidates will have strong academic backgrounds in Mathematics and/or Science, experience teaching young learners (ages 5–18), and a commitment to creating a supportive, inquiry-based, and engaging online learning environment.



Responsibilities



Deliver interactive and engaging Math and/or Science lessons to individuals and small groups of 2–6 students aged 5–18.

Teach using internationally recognized curricula such as A Closer Look, Glencoe Science, Pearson Interactive Science, NGSS-aligned resources, Singapore Math, or IB/AP/A Level Math programs.

Create age-appropriate lesson plans focused on conceptual understanding, inquiry, problem-solving, and real-world applications.

Incorporate visuals, multimedia, and hands-on virtual activities to make abstract concepts accessible and engaging.

Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback to students and parents.

Foster curiosity, discussion, and active learning in a safe and supportive space.



Qualifications



Professional teacher with at least 2 years of teaching experience (Kindergarten–Grade 12).

Must hold a valid teaching license/certification (e.g., Teaching License, State Certification). TESOL/TEFL is a plus.

Near-native English accent with excellent spoken and written communication skills.

Strong academic background in Mathematics and/or Science (Biology, Physics, Chemistry, General Science).

Experience teaching in public/international schools or reputable online platforms.

Familiarity with inquiry-based and/or interdisciplinary approaches (e.g., STEM/STEAM).

Comfortable working between 07:00–22:00 (Weekdays) and 9:00–22:00 (Weekends), GMT+8.

Proficiency with digital platforms such as ClassIn, Microsoft Office, and other educational technologies.

Must have a stable and fast internet connection and a PC/laptop with at least Windows 10 or Mac OS Catalina.



Benefits



Flexible working hours.

Opportunity to teach using globally respected Math and Science curricula.

Be part of an international, passionate team of educators.

Access to training and professional development.

Regular enrollment model (not a booking system), ensuring schedule stability and consistency

title: Credit Repair Specialist
description:
Credit Specialist | Credit Rescue Solutions | REMOTE | Full-Time



Are you a skilled Credit Repair Specialist with experience in the American credit system- Do you have a passion for helping individuals and businesses secure funding and financial freedom- If so, we want YOU on our team!



I’m Gene Ryland, the founder of Credit Rescue Solutions, a B2B accelerator that has helped over 50 clients in the past year access business funding and improve their financial standing. We’re looking to scale to 15+ new clients per month—and we need a top-tier Credit Specialist to make that happen.



This is a remote, full-time position requiring availability during EST business hours (9 AM - 5 PM EST, Monday-Friday).



Who We're Looking For

We are searching for a dedicated, detail-oriented, and highly motivated Credit Specialist with at least one year of experience in the U.S. credit repair industry. You must have a strong understanding of credit reports, dispute processes, and funding strategies. If you have a track record of helping clients boost their credit scores, remove inaccurate negative items, and obtain funding, you’re exactly who we need!



Key Responsibilities

- Credit Repair & Disputes: Work with Dispute Fox software to challenge and remove inaccurate negative items on client credit reports.

- Client Support: Guide clients through the credit repair process, answer questions, and provide education on maintaining a strong credit profile.

- Business Funding Preparation: Help clients optimize their credit profiles to qualify for funding opportunities.

- Communication & Reporting: Work directly with the CEO to report progress, challenges, and solutions.

- Compliance & Best Practices: Ensure all dispute processes follow legal and ethical guidelines under the Fair Credit Reporting Act (FCRA).



What We Offer

- Competitive Pay + Performance-Based Bonuses (Earn more for great results!)

- 100% Remote Work (Work from the comfort of your home!)

- High-Growth Opportunity (Be part of a company scaling from 50 to 1,000+ clients!)

- Collaborative & Fun Team Culture (We take our work seriously but have fun doing it!)

- Impactful Work (You’ll be changing people’s lives by helping them unlock financial opportunities!)



Minimum Qualifications

- Fluent English Speaker & Writer (Clear communication is a must!)

- 1+ Years Experience in U.S. Credit Repair (You must understand credit disputes, inquiries, and the funding process.)

- Experience with Dispute Fox Software (Or the ability to learn it quickly.)

- Excellent Decision-Making & Problem-Solving Skills (You’ll be handling complex credit situations.)

- High Emotional Intelligence & Resilience (You’ll be working with clients facing financial challenges.)

- Strong Organizational Skills & Attention to Detail (Credit repair requires precision!)

- Ability to Work EST Business Hours (9 AM - 5 PM EST, Monday-Friday)



How to Apply (Follow These Steps Carefully!)

---- Subject Line Must Include: "Terminator" (This helps us filter serious applicants!)

---- Attach Your Resume (Show us your experience and skills!)

---- Write a Short Message on why you’re the perfect fit for this role.



---- We are conducting interviews THIS WEEK! If you're a hard worker who thrives in a fast-paced, high-impact role, apply today and join our world-class team!



Looking forward to connecting,

Gene Ryland

Founder, Credit Rescue Solutions

title: Video Editor

title: Operations Manager for eCommerce Agency
description:
We are a growing eCommerce agency working with multiple international clients, and we are looking for a sharp, highly organized, and high-energy Operations Manager who can also handle project management at a strong level.



This is a very important role inside the business.



You will be the person responsible for helping keep the agency organized, making sure tasks are clearly delegated, deadlines are met, communication is strong, and team output is high quality. This is not a passive role and not a basic admin role. We need someone who can think fast, move fast, lead properly, and keep the team aligned.



This role is best for someone who has real experience in operations, team management, project management, eCommerce, and client communication.



What You’ll Be Responsible For

Operations and Team Management



-Manage the day-to-day operations of the agency

-Oversee remote tea
mbers and make sure everyone is aligned and productive

-Delegate tasks clearly and properly based on priority and skill level

-Follow up with tea
mbers to make sure tasks are moving and deadlines are being met

-Spot bottlenecks, delays, and weak performance early and address them fast

-Help improve accountability, structure, and overall team discipline



Project Management



-Take client requests, meeting notes, Loom videos, and feedback and turn them into clear, actionable tasks

-Assign tasks inside ClickUp or other project management tools with proper context, deadlines, and priorities

-Make sure tasks are not just posted, but actually understood by the team

-Keep projects moving forward without needing constant follow-up from the owner

-Ensure urgent tasks are handled on time and important items do not get delayed



Quality Control and Delivery



-Review work before it goes back to the client

-Make sure deliverables are accurate, polished, and aligned with what the client asked for

-Catch mistakes, weak output, or missing details before submission

-Maintain strong internal quality control across all active client projects



Client Communication



-Help manage client communication in a professional, clear, and confident way

-Send updates, follow-ups, and replies on time

-Make sure clients feel taken care of, updated, and supported

-Understand the client’s priorities and communicate them clearly to the team



Systems and Process Improvement



-Improve internal workflows and agency systems

-Help build better SOPs, structure, and processes

-Suggest ways to make the business more efficient

-Identify areas where automation or better systems can save time and improve delivery



What We’re Looking For



-Proven experience as an Operations Manager, Project Manager, or similar leadership role

-Strong experience in eCommerce, websites, and digital marketing environments

-Excellent written and verbal English communication

-Strong leadership and delegation skills

-Very organized, detail-oriented, and proactive

-Able to work with urgency and manage multiple moving parts

-Strong problem-solving ability

-Comfortable managing remote teams

-Comfortable using tools like ClickUp, Slack, Google Workspace, Loom, and similar platforms

-Able to take ownership and reduce the owner’s workload, not add to it



Big Plus If You Have Experience With



-Shopify

-WordPress

-Klaviyo

-Customer support workflows

-Order processing

-Inventory updates

-Canva or basic design coordination

-CRM and automation tools

-Agency operations

-Managing multiple client accounts at once



Important for This Role



This is a full-time, high-focus role inside a small but growing agency.



Because this position is crucial to daily operations, we are looking for someone who can give this role their full attention and energy. You must not have other jobs or active side commitments that will affect your focus, availability, or performance here.



We need someone fully committed, dependable, responsive, and ready to take real ownership.



Who This Role Is For



This role is for someone who:



-likes structure

-can lead people properly

-knows how to manage pressure

-can keep projects organized

-communicates clearly

-has strong urgency

-takes pride in keeping the business running smoothly



This is not for someone who only wants to post tasks, wait for instructions, or do the bare minimum.



Position Details



-Full-time

-Long-term

-Remote

-High ownership role

-Growth opportunity for the right person



How to Apply



To show that you actually read this job post, include the word juice in your cover letter.



Please send:



-Your resume

-A short cover letter explaining your relevant experience

-Why you are a strong fit for this role

-The tools and platforms you have worked with

-Your previous experience managing teams, projects, or agency operations

-If you have strong operations and project management experience in an eCommerce or digital agency setting, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Project Coordinator - Remote
description:
About Us



Lushomo is a data, design, and communication agency working with international organisations on reports, infographics, and digital products.



We operate in a fast-moving, multi-project environment where clarity, responsiveness, and organisation are critical to delivering high-quality work.



---



The Role



We are looking for a highly organised, proactive, and reliable Project Coordinator to ensure our projects are properly set up, clearly structured, and consistently moving forward.



This is not a routine admin role — it requires strong thinking, organisation, and ownership.



You will act as a central coordination point across multiple projects, making sure:

- nothing is missed  

- communication is timely  

- projects are always clear and up to date  



---



 Key Responsibilities



 1. Client Communication (High Priority)

- Ensure all client
s are acknowledged within 24 hours  

- Follow up internally to ensure responses are completed  

- Draft clear, professional
 responses when needed  



---



 2. Project Setup & Quality Control

- Ensure every project is properly set up at the start  

- Check that key elements are in place:

  - Product brief  

  - Treatment overview  

  - Clear milestones and timelines  

  - Quality control gateways  

- Work with Project Managers to ensure consistency and completeness  



---



 3. Project Oversight (ClickUp)

- Ensure every project clearly shows:

  - next actions  

  - assigned owners  

  - deadlines  

- Monitor projects to ensure ClickUp reflects reality  

- Flag missing information, gaps, or unclear steps  



(Project Managers maintain their projects — your role is to ensure clarity and consistency.)



---



 4. Daily Coordination & Follow-Up

- Track progress across multiple projects  

- Follow up on overdue or unclear tasks  

- Flag risks or delays early  

- Help move projects forward by prompting next steps  



---



 5. Supporting Project Delivery

- Help initiate workstreams (e.g. ensuring designers are briefed and ready to start)  

- Support drafting of basic briefs or coordination materials  

- Ensure smooth handovers between stages and tea
mbers  



---



 Working Hours



- Based in the Philippines (remote)  

- Working hours should include at least 3–4 hours overlap with Central European Time (CET)  

- Preferred schedule: approximately 13:00–21:00 (PH time)  

- You will help ensure projects and communications are prepared for the next working day  



---



 What Success Looks Like



- No client
s go unanswered  

- Every project is properly set up and clearly structured  

- All projects have clear next steps at all times  

- Delays are identified early and addressed  

-  Project Managers spend less time on coordination and more time on high-value work



---



 Requirements



- Excellent written and spoken English  

- Strong organisational and time management skills  

- High attention to detail  

- Confident following up with tea
mbers  

- Comfortable using tools such as ClickUp, Slack, and Google Drive  

- Able to manage multiple projects at once  



---



 Key Traits We Are Looking For



- Proactive — you take initiative without waiting to be told  

- Assertive — comfortable chasing updates and asking questions  

- Reliable — you follow through consistently  

- Structured — you like clarity, order, and well-defined processes  

- Calm under pressure  



---



 Nice to Have



- Experience in project coordination, operations, or delivery roles  

- Experience working with international teams  

- Experience in creative, design, or digital environments  



---



 Salary



- Competitive salary based on experience  

- Full-time remote role  



---



 Application Instructions



To apply, please send us your CV, and include:

- A cover letter with a short paragraph (5–8 sentences) explaining how you would organise a project with multiple deadlines and tea
mbers to ensure nothing is missed.

- At the very top of your application, include the word:

“Banana”

- Your expected monthly salary (full-time)



Applications that do not follow all of these instructions will not be considered.



---



We are hiring quickly and will review applications on a rolling basis..

title: Production Graphic Designer & Wireframing Assistant (InDesign, Illustrator, Detail-Oriented)
description:
We are a small international team working on data visualisation, infographics, and reports for organisations such as international agencies and NGOs. We are looking for a reliable, detail-oriented graphic designer to help us turn structured content, wireframes, and rough ideas into clean, professional layouts using Adobe InDesign and Illustrator.



This is not a highly creative or conceptual role. You will follow templates, structured briefs, and clear visual systems. Attention to detail, consistency, and the ability to follow instructions carefully are more important than creativity. In addition to production design, you will also support early-stage work by turning rough notes, sketches, or Loom videos into clear, structured wireframes and layout drafts.



RESPONSIBILITIES

Production layout/ design:

- Create layouts for infographics, reports, and presentations  

- Work mainly in Adobe InDesign and Adobe Illustrator  

- Follow clear briefs, templates, and visual direction  

- Apply consistent spacing, alignment, typography, heading levels, document setup, and hyperlinks/ cross links  

- Perform a final self-check before submission (spelling, alignment, consistency, formatting)  

- Deliver clean, well-organised files (including clear layer structure and file naming)  



Wireframing / Layout Support:

- Create simple wireframes and layout drafts based on rough notes, sketches, or Loom videos  

- Translate ideas into clear, structured visual layouts (e.g. using Miro or similar tools)  

- Improve clarity, organisation, and hierarchy without changing the core concept  



REQUIREMENTS

Essential:

- Strong skills in Adobe InDesign and Adobe Illustrator  

- Good understanding of layout, hierarchy, and typography  

- Comfortable working with detailed instructions, templates, and checklists  

- Ability to follow instructions carefully and check your own work  

- Good written English  

- Reliable and responsive  



Nice to have:

- Experience with infographics or reports  

- Experience working with international clients  

- Familiarity with Miro, Figma, or similar tools for wireframing  

- Experience working with structured design systems or templates  



What We Are Looking For:

We are not looking for highly experimental or artistic work.

We are looking for someone who:

- Produces clean, precise, professional layouts  

- Pays close attention to detail  

- Is comfortable working within clear guidelines and templates  

- Can turn rough ideas into clear, structured wireframes/layouts  

- Can improve spacing, hierarchy, and organisation  

- Is comfortable doing sometimes repetitive work to a high standard  



Working Arrangement:

- Remote (work from home)  

- Initially part-time, starting with a small number of guaranteed hours (approx. 10–20 hours per month)  

- Additional work will be available from the start  

- Strong opportunity for this role to grow into a larger, long-term position over time  



Salary:

Competitive rate based on experience. We are open to both junior and mid-level candidates.



Test Task:

Shortlisted candidates will be asked to complete a paid test task (2–3 hours).



You will be given:

- A production design task (layout, clean-up and formatting)  

- A simple wireframing task based on rough input  

We will evaluate accuracy, consistency, organisation, and attention to detail.



How to Apply

Please include:

- A link to your portfolio with 2–3 examples of reports, infographics, or layout-heavy work  

- A short note explaining your experience with InDesign and Illustrator  

- Your answer to this question: What steps do you take to check your work before submitting?  

- To confirm you have read this post carefully, please begin your application with the word LAYOUT

title: Financial & Business Operations Associate (Part-Time )
description:
Part-Time | Growth-Oriented Venture Role



Job Overview



Capacity: 8–10 hours per week initially



Location: Primarily remote (Philippines-based)



Travel: Occasional domestic site visits (expenses covered)



Focus: Venture evaluation, operational structuring, and international coordination



About the Role



I am building and testing several early-stage business initiatives in the Philippines and am seeking a sharp, analytical professional to help evaluate and structure them.



This is not a standard bookkeeping role. This is a venture evaluation and operations role for someone who wants to understand how businesses are tested, improved, and scaled from the ground up.



The initial assignment involves evaluating a small agricultural venture in the Visayas-Mindanao region. There are minimal formal records in place.



Your task will be to determine:



Is this venture economically viable?



What are the true unit economics and cost drivers?



Should we scale, improve, pivot, or discontinue the project?



Growth Pathway



Beyond the initial farm project, responsibilities may expand into:



Designing structured market research systems for U.S. companies studying emerging Southeast Asian consumers



Organizing workflows and validation processes for AI-driven initiatives



Synthesizing field data into clear reports for U.S.-based stakeholders



Building repeatable frameworks for evaluating early-stage ventures



What You’ll Do



Conduct site visits and convert physical operations into structured financial data



Build simple, practical tracking systems (ClickUp or similar tools are a plus)



Analyze margins, cost drivers, and sustainability



Provide clear, direct recommendations on project viability



Coordinate research and validate information for new initiatives



Work independently and communicate findings concisely



Who This Role Suits



You may be a strong fit if you:



Have a degree in Accounting, Finance, Economics, or Business (CPA welcome but not required)



Think analytically and enjoy solving ambiguous problems



Are comfortable working independently



Communicate clearly across different types of stakeholders



Are curious about international business and technology



Fluency in Cebuano or Surigaonon is an advantage for field work but not required.



Compensation & Location



Philippines-based applicants only



Cebu, Davao, and Visayas/Mindanao candidates preferred for ease of travel



Primarily remote, with occasional site visits (expenses covered)



Compensation is project-based and aligned with an early-stage growth role.

Please include your expected hourly rate in your application.



How to Apply



 

 with:



Your resume



Your location



Your expected hourly rate



A short paragraph explaining why early-stage business evaluation interests you.

title: Paid Ads Partner (Meta & Google)
description:
We’re a local, service-based business looking for a paid ads partner, not a “monitor the dashboard and send a report” type.



Some of our ad accounts are tidy.

Some of them are… spaghetti.



If you enjoy untangling things, or knowing when to bin them and rebuild properly,  you’ll enjoy this.



We care far more about clear thinking and good judgement than job titles or buzzwords.



What this role actually is



You’ll own strategy and execution across Meta and Google Ads.



Your job is to help turn paid traffic into booked intro sessions, and booked intros into real people turning up.



I’ll handle coaching, sales, and conversion.

You handle making the ads make sense.



What you’ll be doing



Plan, build, and launch Meta 
/Instagram) and Google Ads campaigns



Clean up and restructure historical campaigns so accounts are logical and manageable



Actively optimise week by week (keywords, audiences, creatives, budgets, messaging)



Work with existing assets and lead or guide ad creatives



Help set up a simple, clear dashboard (nothing over-engineered)



Explain what’s working, what’s not, and what you’re changing next



TikTok Ads may come later...  but only once the foundations are solid.



Creatives (important bit)



You don’t need to be a designer.

You do need to be comfortable leading or collaborating on creatives.



That might mean:



Writing or refining ad copy



Repurposing existing photos or videos into ads



Briefing angles or hooks for short-form video



Improving creatives over time instead of waiting for “perfect assets”



If you need everything handed to you fully formed, this won’t be a fit.



Experience we’re looking for



Solid hands-on PPC experience (years matter less than judgement)



Comfortable making decisions with imperfect data and real budgets



Confident building from scratch and fixing messy or underperforming accounts



Strong understanding of user behaviour, intent, and lead quality



Experience with local or service-based lead generation is a big plus



This isn’t a junior role, but it’s also not about ego or theory.



Tools you should be comfortable with



Google Ads



Meta Ads Manager



GA4 (for sanity-checking behaviour, not vanity metrics)



Solid understanding of tracking (Pixel / GTM awareness)



We use GoHighLevel for leads and funnels.



Time & budget



Initial 3-month trial



Month 1: more hours may be needed for build-out (to be agreed)



Months 2–3: 5 hours per week



$10–$15 USD per hour, depending on fit



Short weekly or fortnightly check-in around 11am GMT



Monthly ad spend is typically around $1,000 USD, so efficiency matters



What this role is not



“Set and forget”



Social media posting



SEO or content writing



Fancy reports nobody reads



To apply, tell me:



A brief example of a local or service-based lead gen campaign you’ve managed



What you’d focus on in your first 30 days with a $1,000 ad budget



How you usually handle ad creatives (create, guide, collaborate, repurpose)



If you like thinking clearly, working with real constraints, and turning chaos into something usable, you’ll fit in well.



We don’t need perfection, but we love progress.



- Lee

title: STRUCTURAL ENGINEER / STATICIAN
description:
JOB ADVERTISEMENT – STRUCTURAL ENGINEER / STATICIAN (REMOTE)



FingerHug, a company based in Bosnia and Herzegovina specializing in architectural design, technical development, structural planning, and project support, is expanding its team and is looking for an experienced Structural Engineer / Statician for a remote position.



We are looking for a highly skilled, responsible, and self-driven professional with strong expertise in structural design, analysis, and evaluation, who can contribute to the technical development of projects with precision, reliability, and a deep understanding of structural safety and construction logic.



Requirements and qualifications:

• minimum 10 years of experience in the same or similar roles 

• strong professional background in structural engineering and static analysis 

• proven experience in the design, review, and evaluation of structural systems for residential or commercial buildings 

• solid understanding of reinforced concrete, steel, and other structural elements 

• ability to perform structural calculations and assess load-bearing systems, stability, and overall structural performance 

• experience in reviewing structural drawings, technical documentation, and execution-related details 

• strong understanding of construction methods, structural behavior, and applicable engineering standards 

• ability to identify practical, safe, and efficient structural solutions 

• proficiency in relevant engineering and technical software; knowledge of AutoCAD and structural analysis tools is expected 

• strong computer skills 

• active command of the English language, both written and spoken 

• strong organizational and communication skills 

• independence, responsibility, and a professional approach to work 

• ability to work both independently and as part of a team in a remote environment 



Key responsibilities:

• developing, reviewing, and evaluating structural solutions for company projects 

• performing structural calculations and verifying the safety and feasibility of proposed systems 

• reviewing technical documentation, drawings, and structural details 

• contributing to the optimization of structural concepts in line with safety, functionality, and execution requirements 

• collaborating with the team to ensure technically sound and realistic project solutions 

• helping align structural planning with project requirements, standards, and construction realities 

• staying up to date with current engineering standards, regulations, and best practices in structural design 



What we offer:

• stable employment 

• remote work 

• opportunity to work on serious and professionally driven projects 

• competitive compensation, based on experience, knowledge, and contribution 

• a professional working environment and the opportunity for long-term cooperation 



Application:

Interested candidates are invited to send their CV to: 



Please use the following subject line: Application for Structural Engineer / Statician Position (Remote)



Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

title: NDIS Bookkeeper
description:
We are looking for a detail-oriented NDIS Bookkeeper to support billing, invoicing, and financial administration for NDIS service providers. This role involves managing NDIS invoices, reconciling payments, resolving claim issues, and ensuring compliance with NDIS pricing arrangements.



The ideal candidate has experience with NDIS billing systems, invoice reconciliation, and financial record management.



Key Responsibilities

- Prepare and submit NDIS invoices using correct support line items

- Reconcile invoices, payments, and outstanding claims

- Investigate and resolve rejected or unpaid NDIS claims

- Follow up with plan managers and stakeholders regarding invoice status

- Maintain accurate financial records and bookkeeping data

- Review billing to identify discrepancies or missing payments

- Ensure compliance with NDIS pricing arrangements and billing requirements

- Support improvements to invoicing and reconciliation processes



Requirements

- Experience in NDIS bookkeeping, billing, or finance support

- Strong understanding of NDIS line items and pricing arrangements

- Experience handling NDIS claims, invoices, and reconciliations

- High attention to detail and strong organizational skills

- Ability to investigate and resolve billing discrepancies

Preferred

HMO Benefit

Stable long-term role

Supportive and professional team environment

3. A short summary of your experience based on the requirements

Shortlisted candidates will be contacted for an interview.

title: Social Media Marketer
description:
We are hiring a new Social Media Strategist for our Agency and you will help us to create viral Reels and manage the accounts of our clients to grow them to higher numbers and scale our agency. We 4x our revenue last month and with this foundation we want to scale even higher now, so we need an experienced Social Media Marketing Strategist to maintain the quality for our clients. If you already have experience with Social Media (Short Form Content on Instagram Reels), you are creative, know how to create video concepts that go viral and how to analyse viral videos, this job is perfect for you.



Why you should work with us:



- You start with established personal brands - The client(s) you will work with, have proven concepts, so you can build on a solid foundation and use the style of their existing videos to develop even better concepts.

- AI Implementation - AI is becoming more and more relevant and we are already using AI for many different areas, especially for content (picture/video) creation, so you are up to date with AI for social media while other companies don’t use AI at all. So you are 3 steps ahead.

- Different projects - Step by step you will work with different accounts / clients so you can be creative in different areas.

- Long Term partnership - We are only looking for long term employees, so you will work with us for a long time and have a stable income with a growing agency.

- Established Agency - Our agency is active since 2022, so we gained a lot of experience in all fields of social media, so you will learn from our experience which will help you to improve your social media skills.

- Clear guides and onboarding - You will clear instructions on how to do you work in a detailed onboarding and training. Combined with your own knowledge we will make sure to have the best results.



Your specific task:



You have 3 daily main tasks to focus on, besides that you will get more different tasks over the time when we see that you’re doing a great job:



1. Market Research - You go through the market and find viral Reels / Trends from other creators that have potential to go viral for our clients

2. Concept Creation - Based on your research you create the specific video concepts that our content team / clients should create.

3. Analyse our videos - Not only looking for new concepts is important but also analysing our own accounts and videos, finding winning patterns and implementing these information in the concept creation.



Other potential tasks in the future that give you more responsibility:



- Team Management - We have a big team for reposting content, where we need support with employee onboarding, technical setups and video creation

- More clients - Depending on your workload you will work with more of our clients and help with more different concepts

- Implementing complete new ideas - Your main task is to improve our current system but we always have new ideas, new concepts and new strategies that we need to implement and test with our existing systems.



What we expect and need from you:



- Experience with Social Media / Short Form video creation. Not only uploading simple posts for companies but actual experience and skills in video conception for content that goes viral and analysing viral videos.

- Experience in the Online Marketing Space. This is not a beginner job and you should know how social media is used in the business world.

- 7 Days / week. This is a well paid job, so we are looking for a high performing employee.

- Fluent English (speaking & writing) since our clients are mainly from USA.



Salary and Perspective:



Since we are looking for the best employee for this job, we start with a salary of $800 per month. In the future there is a chance for more if you do a good job and you help us to reach our company goals. Depending on your skills and results you can get more responsibility and more projects.



If you’re looking for a long term job, then message me here with the code word “smms” in your application :)

title: Xero Bookkeeper & VAT Tracking Assistant (2 UK Companies)
description:

keep Xero accurate and up to date

handle journals between the two companies properly

What You’ll Do

Weekly / Ongoing

Reconcile bank transactions in Xero

Match receipts using Dext

Keep both Xero accounts clean and up to date

Monthly

Post journals between the two companies

Follow simple allocation rules we provide

Make sure both companies align properly

Rolling 12-month turnover

% of VAT threshold used

Monthly trend

???? I need to be able to glance at this and know where we are immediately

What changed this month

Anything unusual

Any risks or actions needed (especially VAT-related)

Fortnightly (Every 2 Weeks)

15-minute video call (UK morning time)

VAT tracker

current position vs threshold

anything that needs attention

How We Work

You stay on top of your work without needing to be chased

Requirements

2+ years hands-on Xero experience

Organised and proactive

Hours & Pay

Long-term role

$8–$12/hour depending on experience

A brief example of a time you spotted a financial issue



Applications without a video will not be considered.

If you are not confident with journal entries or VAT tracking, this role is probably not the right fit.

title: Accounts Payable Specialist
description:
We are looking for a detail-oriented Accounts Payable Specialist to manage the company’s outgoing payments and ensure invoices, expenses, and vendor accounts are processed accurately and on time. The ideal candidate is organized, deadline-driven, and experienced in maintaining clean payable records.



Key Responsibilities

Review, verify, and process vendor invoices and expense reports

Match purchase orders, invoices, and receipts

Prepare and schedule payments (checks, ACH, wire transfers)

title: SQL Analyst
description:
We are seeking a detail-oriented SQL Analyst to transform raw data into meaningful insights that support business decisions. The ideal candidate is analytical, highly proficient in SQL, and comfortable working with large datasets to create reports, dashboards, and data-driven recommendations.



Key Responsibilities

Write, optimize, and maintain complex SQL queries

Extract, clean, and analyze data from multiple databases

Build reports, dashboards, and data visualizations for stakeholders

Identify trends, patterns, and anomalies in datasets

Collaborate with teams to define data requirements and KPIs

Ensure data accuracy, integrity, and consistency across systems

Automate recurring reports and data processes

Support ad-hoc data requests and analysis

Document queries, processes, and data definitions



Qualifications

Proven experience as an SQL Analyst, Data Analyst, or similar role

Advanced proficiency in SQL (joins, subqueries, CTEs, indexing, optimization)

Experience working with relational databases (e.g., MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL Server)

Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

Proficiency in Excel / Google Sheets

Ability to communicate insights clearly to non-technical stakeholders

Good written and verbal English communication skills



Nice to Have

Experience with BI tools (e.g., Power BI, Tableau, Looker)

Basic knowledge of Python or R for data analysis

Experience with data warehousing concepts

Familiarity with ETL processes



Tools & Systems

SQL databases (MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL Server)

BI tools (Power BI, Tableau, Looker)

Excel / Google Sheets

title: Meta Ads Video Editor (UGC / Direct Response - ecommerce)
description:
We are hiring a high-performance video editor to create short-form ad creatives for an e-commerce brand. 



This is NOT basic editing. You must understand how to make videos that convert on Meta 
/Instagram)



You will be responsible for: 

- Creating 5 - 15 short-form videos per week (15 - 45 seconds)

- Editing UGC style ads (TikTok-style, fast-paces, high retention)

- Adding hooks, captions, sound effects, and pacing for optimised conversions

- Iterating on winning creatives, not just making 'random' videos

- Following briefs, but also contributing your own creative ideas



You MUST understand: 

- Hook within first 1 - 3 seconds

- Retention editing (pattern interrupts, pacing)

- Direct response style ads (problem, solution, proof, CTA)

- Basic ad psychology (what makes people stop scrolling to buy)



Tools: 

CapCut / Premiere Pro / After Effects (any is fine, but you must be fast)



APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS:

To be considered, you must: 

1. Send 3-5 examples of ads you have made (no generic edits)

2. Include the word "WINNER" at the top of your application

3. Briefly explain why you think those ads would perform well



If you do not follow these steps, your application will be ignored. 





WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR

- Experience with e-commerce ads / dropshipping ads

- Fast turnaround (24-48h per batch)

- Strong English understanding

- Ability to receive feedback and improve quickly



Performance bonuses are available if ads perform well, up to 10% of net profits from each advert.

International team culture

Send your portfolio and a brief intro about your experience to [your
/application link]. Include "eBook Designer" in the subject line.

title: Shopify Web Developer - CRO Specialist - Ecommerce Advertising Agency - Full Time 2a
description:
APPLY ON MY WEBSITE TO BE CONSIDERED: 


/cro-shopify-web-developer/



CRO Shopify Web Developer – Job Overview

I am looking for an experienced shopify web developer to help me upgrade client’s checkout processes and execute CRO tests for various ecommerce brands.

In this role you will update Shopify theme templates, develop landing pages using various page builders and html/CSS frameworks, research/install various checkout/bundle applications, and implement A/B tests using testing tools like intelligems.

You will also report on test performance, and provide suggestions for next steps.

This is a full-time opportunity. Training will be provided and you will work directly with me.



About Zack Miller

My name is Zack Miller, and I’ve been a DTC Ecommerce Growth Marketer since 2019. I’ve done everything fro
dia buying and client strategy, to agency internal operations.

I’ve contributed to the growth of over 200 ecommerce brands in my agency experience. Now, as an independent growth marketing partner, I work closely with a small number of brands on their new customer acquisition strategy.



Note: All Remote Employees Must Be Available To Work During The Following Business Hours:

Monday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Tuesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Wednesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Thursday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Friday: 9am – 5:30pm EST



Roles & Responsibilities

- Develop landing pages using Figma and various WYSYWIG editors including but not limited to Replo and Pagefly.

- Edit product, collection and other page templates using Shopify Liquid template engine, and various HTML/CSS frameworks.

- Install various checkout/tracking applications (aftersell, Zipify OCU, Upstack, etc)

- Install various applications for product bundling when needed, and create product bundles. 

- Install tracking pixels on client’s websites

- Implement A/B tests in intelligems for product price tests, shipping price tests, theme tests, landing page tests, and more. 

- Research new ideas for direct response content marketing strategies.

- Work in my project management system, ClickUp.

- Apply a process-first mentality and provide feedback to help further develop our operating systems.



Required Experience & Education

- Strong verbal and written English language skills (American Dialect)

- Strong knowledge of HTML/CSS/Javascript/Shopify Liquid required. 

- Knowledge of Python and Ruby preferred but not required.

- 1+ years of web development (Shopify) experience required

- 1+ years of backend python (flask/django) development experience preferred but not required

- 1+ years of marketing agency experience preferred but not required

- Must be highly organized and possess strong attention to detail

- All applicants are encouraged to apply, regardless of experience or education



APPLY ON MY WEBSITE TO BE CONSIDERED: 


/cro-shopify-web-developer/a

title: Healthcare Recruiter
description:
Job description:



We are a growing U.S.-based healthcare company seeking a Recruiter / Interview Specialist to support therapist hiring across multiple departments.



This role is call-heavy and interview-focused, with additional responsibility for coordinating hiring needs and tracking recruitment progress. Approximately 90% of your work will involve phone interviews with therapist candidates.



If you are not comfortable being on calls for most of your shift, this role is not a good fit.



Role Overview



• You will conduct daily phone interviews with licensed therapists (PT, OT, ST, PTA, COTA), coordinate with internal teams on hiring needs, and manage the recruitment pipeline from job posting through candidate handoff.

• You are the first point of contact for candidates and a key link between departments, so professionalism, organization, and communication are essential.



Key Responsibilities



• Interviewing & Screening (Primary Focus)

• Conduct high-volume phone interviews daily with therapist candidates.

• Screen candidates for: Licensure and credentials, Experience and specialties, Availability and geographic coverage,



Communication skills and professionalism

• Clearly explain roles, expectations, and next steps.

• Identify red flags and escalate concerns when necessary.

• Recruitment Coordination & Follow-Ups

• Follow up with candidates after interviews as needed.

• Coordinate with internal departments (staffing, operations, leadership) to understand current and upcoming hiring needs.

• Schedule next steps and hand off qualified candidates appropriately.

• Maintain timely and professional communication with candidates throughout the process.

• Job Posting & Process Tracking

• Post job openings on approved platforms as hiring needs change.

• Track candidates through each stage of the recruitment process.

• Keep recruitment trackers or ATS accurate and up to date.

• Provide basic updates on hiring progress when requested.



What We’re Looking For



• Comfortable being on the phone most of the workday.

• Clear, confident, professional speaking voice.

• Strong listening and judgment skills.

• Highly organized and detail-oriented.

• Able to manage follow-ups and coordination without losing 
ntum.



Qualifications



• 1–2+ years of experience in: Recruiting, Healthcare staffing, HR screening, Call center interviewing

• Excellent spoken and written English.

• Comfortable conducting multiple interviews per day.

• Familiar with Google Workspace (Sheets, Docs).

• Bonus: Experience recruiting healthcare professionals or independent contractors.



Requirements



• Reliable internet connection.

• Quiet, professional work environment for calls.

• Ability to work U.S. (PST) business hours.

• Part-time or full-time availability (to be discussed).



How to apply



• Please send a brief cover letter outlining your experience that is aligned or related to the role you are applying for. Make sure to include the specific tasks you have handled, as well as the link to your resume.

• Kindly monitor your OLJ inbox, as I will send the final interview link and your schedule there if you are shortlisted for the position.





Benefits:



• Paid training

• Work from home



Experience:



• Recruiting: 2 years (Required)

• Healthcare Staffing: 1 year (Required)

• Work Location: Remote

title: HIRING: Customer Support Specialist - Automotive
description:
HIRING: Customer Support Specialist - Automotive



HOW TO APPLY:

Fill out this Google Candidate Form: 
 



Job Overview:

We are hiring a Customer Support Specialist to support customers in a fast-paced e-commerce and manufacturing environment. This role requires clear communication, fast response times, and strong product knowledge. You will handle customer inquiries through
, live chat, inbound phone calls, and online marketplaces while maintaining a professional and accurate brand experience.



This is a full-time remote position with mixed shifts, including weekday mid-to-after hours and one weekend day shift.

Position Details:

Employment Type: Full-time, Remote

Work Schedule: 40 hours per week (mixed shifts)

Compensation: USD 7 per hour (base pay)



Key Responsibilities:

1. Customer Ticket Support 
 / HelpDesk)

2. Respond to all incoming tickets within 15 minutes during assigned shifts

3. Follow approved response templates and troubleshooting processes

4. Verify customer information before providing order details, cancellations, or refunds

5. Escalate technical or unusual issues to senior support when needed

6. Inbound Phone Support (Customer Service and Sales)

7. Answer inbound calls professionally within 3 rings

8. Handle order status, tracking, shipping issues, and basic troubleshooting

9. Assist inbound sales calls with product recommendations, kit comparisons, and basic installation guidance

10. Explain value versus cost clearly and accurately

11. Log all calls properly in the CRM system





Order Management

1. Look up and manage orders using Shopify and ShipStation

2. Confirm tracking details, delivery status, and shipping exceptions

3. Create RMAs, replacement shipments, and internal notes when authorized

4. Follow fraud prevention and verification procedures



Product Knowledge Development

1. Learn the differences between horn kits, compressors, tanks, and mounting systems

2. Understand common installation issues and troubleshooting methods

3. Develop strong familiarity with top-selling products



Marketplace and Social Message Support (if assigned)

1. Respond to customer messages on
, Instagram, and TikTok Shop

2. Handle eBay and Amazon customer inquiries

3. Escalate refund demands, policy disputes, or chargeback concerns



Performance Expectations:

1.
 response time under 15 minutes

2. Minimum 95 percent ticket accuracy
